src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:  // Try extracting from suffix
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:  const qtySuffixRegex = /\s+(\d+(\.\d+)?)\s*(কেজি|কিলো|গ্রাম|লিটার|মিলি|পিস|টি|টা|ডজন|হালি|পোয়া|kg|g|gm|liter|ml|pcs|piece|كجم|كيلو|جرام|لتر|مل|قطعة|حبة)?$/i;

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:  
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:  const parseMatch = (match: RegExpMatchArray) => {

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    const unit = match[3]?.trim().toLowerCase() || '';

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:           parsedNum = parsedNum / 1000;
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:        }
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    } else if (unit === 'পোয়া') {
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:        parsedNum = parsedNum * 0.25;

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:export const formatToBnDate = (dateStr: string): string => {

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:  
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:  // Try to parse DD/MM/YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    const [d, m, y] = dateStr.split('/').map(Number);
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    date = new Date(y, m - 1, d);

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    date = new Date(dateStr);
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:  }
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:  if (isNaN(date.getTime())) return dateStr;
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:  const bnMonths = [
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    'জানুয়ারি', 'ফেব্রুয়ারি', 'মার্চ', 'এপ্রিল', 'মে', 'জুন',
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    'জুলাই', 'আগস্ট', 'সেপ্টেম্বর', 'অক্টোবর', 'নভেম্বর', 'ডিসেম্বর'

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:  const toBnNum = (n: number | string) => {
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    const nums: Record<string, string> = {
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:      '0': '০', '1': '১', '2': '২', '3': '৩', '4': '৪',
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:      '5': '৫', '6': '৬', '7': '৭', '8': '৮', '9': '৯'

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:  };

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:export const parseNewProductVoiceCommand = (rawText: string) => {
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    let remainder = rawText;
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    const newProductPattern = /(?:নতুন|new)\s*(?:প্রোডাক্ট|product|ফোডাক্ট|ইনভেন্টরি|inventory)(?:\s*(?:অ্যাড|এড|add))?(?:\s*(?:করো|করেন|কর|do))?\s*/i;
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    const prefixMatch = remainder.match(newProductPattern);

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    const translated = translateNumbers(remainder);
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    let name = translated;
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    let price = 0;
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    let stock = 0;
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    let unit = 'unit';
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    const priceRegexes = [
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:        /(?:দাম|price)\s*(\d+(\.\d+)?)\s*(?:টাকা|tk)?/i,
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:        /(\d+(\.\d+)?)\s*(?:টাকা|tk)/i

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    for (const regex of priceRegexes) {
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:        const pMatch = name.match(regex);
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:        if (pMatch) {
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:            price = parseFloat(pMatch[1]);
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:            name = name.replace(pMatch[0], '');
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:            break;
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:        }
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    }
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    const stockRegexes = [
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:        /(?:স্টক|স্টোক|stock)\s*(\d+(\.\d+)?)\s*([a-zA-Z\u0980-\u09FF]+)?/i,
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:        /(?:^|\s+)(\d+(\.\d+)?)\s*(কেজি|গ্রাম|লিটার|মিলি|পিস|টি|টা|kg|g|gm|ml|pcs|piece|packet|প্যাকেট)(?:\s|$)/i,

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    ];
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    let extractedUnitStr = '';
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:    for (const regex of stockRegexes) {
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:        const sMatch = name.match(regex);
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:        if (sMatch) {
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:            stock = parseFloat(sMatch[1]);
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:            if (sMatch[3]) extractedUnitStr = sMatch[3];
src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:            name = name.replace(sMatch[0], '');

src/utils/voiceUtils.ts:

src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:export const parseMathVoiceCommandAI = async (rawText: string): Promise<string | null> => {
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:  const ai = getAI();
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:  if (!ai) return null;
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:  const prompt = `
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:You are a high-speed mathematical expression extractor.
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:Input: A voice transcript in Bengali, English, or mixed.
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:Output: A valid JavaScript mathematical expression string (e.g., "500+302+112+70").
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:CONVERSION RULES (Apply strictly):
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:- Numbers: এক->1, দুই->2, তিন->3, চার->4, পাঁচ->5, ছয়->6, সাত->7, আট->8, নয়->9, শূন্য->0
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:- Tens: দশ/দশটি->10, কুড়ি->20, ত্রিশ->30, চল্লিশ->40, পঞ্চাশ->50, ৬০->60, ৭০->70, ৮০->80, ৯০->90
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:- Hundreds: একশো/একশ->100, দুইশ->200, তিনশো->300, চারশ->400, পাঁচশ->500, ছয়শ->600, সাতশো->700
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:- Multipliers: হাজার->1000, লাখ->100000
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:- Operators: প্লাস/যোগ/আরও/এন্ড/সাথে/মাইনাস/বিয়োগ/বাদ/ইনটু/গুণ/ভাগ/ডিভাইড -> "+", "-", "*", "/" accordingly.
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:- Bengali Digits: ১->1, ২->2, ৩->3, ৪->4, ৫->5, ৬->6, ৭->7, ৮->8, ৯->9, ০->0
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:BEHAVIOR:
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:1. Extract every number and operator mentioned in sequence.
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:2. If no operator is mentioned between numbers, assume addition (+).
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:3. Ignore filler words like "টাকা", "দাও", "করো", "হচ্ছে", "মোট", "হবে", "হলো", "সমান".
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:4. Handle long sequences (up to 40+ additions).
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:5. If an operator is at the end (e.g. "500 + 200 plus"), ignore the trailing operator.
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:6. Only output the math string. No text. 
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:Examples:
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:- "৫০০ প্লাস ২শ" -> 500+200
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:- "৫০২ প্লাস ৩শ ২ প্লাস ৭০ যোগ" -> 502+302+70
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:- "৭০২ প্লাস ৫০২ প্লাস ৩০২ প্লাস ১১২ প্লাস ৪০২ প্লাস ৬০২ প্লাস ৭০ হবে" -> 702+502+302+112+402+602+70
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:- "৫০০ যোগ ২০০ মাইনাস ৫০" -> 500+200-50
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:- "পাঁচশ দুই প্লাস ছয়শ সাত প্লাস আশি" -> 502+607+80
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:Transcript: "${rawText}"
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:`;
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:  try {
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:    const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:      model: "gemini-flash-latest",
src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:      contents: prompt,

src/utils/mathVoiceParser.ts:        temperature: 0,

src/utils/productMatcher.ts:// Bengali to English numeral converter
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:export const bengaliToEnglishDigits = (text: string): string => {
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  const map: { [key: string]: string } = {
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:    '০': '0', '১': '1', '২': '2', '৩': '3', '৪': '4',
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:    '৫': '5', '৬': '6', '৭': '7', '৮': '8', '৯': '9'
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  };
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  return text.split('').map(char => map[char] || char).join('');
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:};

src/utils/productMatcher.ts:// Normalizes Bengali characters to resolve common spelling/phonetic differences (e.g., Unicode য় vs য়, শ vs ষ, etc.)
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:export const normalizeBengaliPhonetic = (text: string): string => {
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  if (!text) return "";
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  let norm = text.toLowerCase().trim();
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  // Standardize Unicode composition differences for yya (য + ় vs য়)
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  norm = norm.replace(/\u09AF\u09BC/g, 'য'); // য with dot -> য
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  norm = norm.replace(/\u09DF/g, 'য');       // য় -> য
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  norm = norm.replace(/য়/g, 'য');            // literal combining য় -> য
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  norm = norm.replace(/য়/g, 'য');            // literal য় -> য
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  // Normalize dental/palatal/retroflex sibilants
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  norm = norm.replace(/[শষস]/g, 'স');        // শ, ষ, স -> স
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  // Normalize retroflex r
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  norm = norm.replace(/[ড়ঢ়র]/g, 'র');        // ড়, ঢ়, র -> র
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  // Normalize nasal consonants
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  norm = norm.replace(/[ণনঁং]/g, 'ন');       // ণ, ন, ঁ, ং -> ন
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  // Normalize vowel markings for simplified matching
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  norm = norm.replace(/[ীি]/g, 'ি');          // ী, ি -> ি
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  norm = norm.replace(/[ূু]/g, 'ু');          // ূ, ু -> ু
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  norm = norm.replace(/[েৈ]/g, 'ে');          // ে, ৈ -> ে
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  norm = norm.replace(/[োৗ]/g, 'ো');         // ো, ৗ -> ো
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  return norm;
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:};

src/utils/productMatcher.ts:export const fuzzyMatchProduct = (productsList: any[], requestedName: string): any => {
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  if (!requestedName) return undefined;
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  const reqClean = requestedName.toLowerCase().trim();
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  // --- 1. MATCH BY SERIAL NUMBER OR INDEX ---
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:  // If the query contains digits (in English or Bengali) and words indicating sequence/rank like "number", "serial", "নম্বর", "সিরিয়াল"

src/utils/productMatcher.ts:    if (foundBySerial) {
src/utils/productMatcher.ts:      return foundBySerial;

src/components/JarvisAI.tsx:
src/components/JarvisAI.tsx:      if (!voice) {

src/components/JarvisAI.tsx:      utterance.onerror = (e) => {

src/components/JarvisAI.tsx:      };

src/components/JarvisAI.tsx:             }

src/components/JarvisAI.tsx:      } else {

src/firebase.ts:  operationType: OperationType;
src/firebase.ts:  path: string | null;
src/firebase.ts:  authInfo: {

src/firebase.ts:export function handleFirestoreError(error: unknown, operationType: OperationType, path: string | null) {
src/firebase.ts:  const errInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
src/firebase.ts:    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
src/firebase.ts:    authInfo: {
src/firebase.ts:      email: auth.currentUser?.email,
src/firebase.ts:      emailVerified: auth.currentUser?.emailVerified,
src/firebase.ts:      isAnonymous: auth.currentUser?.isAnonymous,
src/firebase.ts:      tenantId: auth.currentUser?.tenantId,
src/firebase.ts:      providerInfo: auth.currentUser?.providerData?.map(provider => ({
src/firebase.ts:      providerId: provider.providerId,
src/firebase.ts:      displayName: provider.displayName,
src/firebase.ts:      email: provider.email,
src/firebase.ts:      photoUrl: provider.photoURL
src/firebase.ts:    })) || []
src/firebase.ts:    },
src/firebase.ts:    operationType,
src/firebase.ts:    path
src/firebase.ts:  }
src/firebase.ts:  console.error('Firestore Error: ', JSON.stringify(errInfo));
src/firebase.ts:  throw new Error(JSON.stringify(errInfo));
src/firebase.ts:}

src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:export function useVoiceSearch(onCommand: (text: string) => void, onError?: (error: string) => void, lang: string = 'bn-BD') {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  const [isListening, setIsListening] = useState(false);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  const [voiceFeedback, setVoiceFeedback] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  const recognitionRef = useRef<any>(null);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  useEffect(() => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    const SpeechRecognition = (window as any).SpeechRecognition || (window as any).webkitSpeechRecognition;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    if (SpeechRecognition && !recognitionRef.current) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:       recognitionRef.current = new SpeechRecognition();
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:       recognitionRef.current.lang = lang;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:       recognitionRef.current.continuous = true;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:       recognitionRef.current.interimResults = true;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:       recognitionRef.current.maxAlternatives = 1;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    if (recognitionRef.current) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:       recognitionRef.current.lang = lang;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  }, [lang]);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  useEffect(() => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    return () => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      if (recognitionRef.current) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        recognitionRef.current.onend = null;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        recognitionRef.current.onresult = null;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        recognitionRef.current.onerror = null;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        try { recognitionRef.current.stop(); } catch(e) {}
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    };
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  }, []);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  const onCommandRef = useRef(onCommand);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  const onErrorRef = useRef(onError);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  useEffect(() => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    onCommandRef.current = onCommand;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  }, [onCommand]);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  useEffect(() => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    onErrorRef.current = onError;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  }, [onError]);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  const isListeningRef = useRef(isListening);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  useEffect(() => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    isListeningRef.current = isListening;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  }, [isListening]);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  useEffect(() => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    if (!recognitionRef.current) return;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    let accumulatedText = "";
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    let timeoutId: any = null;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      recognitionRef.current.onresult = (event: any) => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        let isFinalResult = false;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        let finalBatch = [];
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        for (let i = event.resultIndex; i < event.results.length; ++i) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:          if (event.results[i].isFinal) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:            isFinalResult = true;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:            finalBatch.push(event.results[i][0].transcript);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:          }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        const newText = finalBatch.join(' ').trim();
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        if (newText) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:          setVoiceFeedback(newText);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:          if (timeoutId) clearTimeout(timeoutId);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:          timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:             onCommandRef.current(newText);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:             setVoiceFeedback(null);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:          }, 1000); 
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      };
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    recognitionRef.current.onend = () => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      if (timeoutId) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:         clearTimeout(timeoutId);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:         if (accumulatedText.trim()) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:            onCommandRef.current(accumulatedText.trim());
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:            accumulatedText = "";
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:         }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:         setVoiceFeedback(null);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      if (isListeningRef.current) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:          try { recognitionRef.current.start(); } catch(e) {}
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    };
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    recognitionRef.current.onerror = (e: any) => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      if (e.error !== 'no-speech' && e.error !== 'aborted') {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:          console.error("Speech recognition error:", e.error);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:          if (onErrorRef.current) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:            onErrorRef.current(e.error);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:          }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      setIsListening(false);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    };
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    return () => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        // We do not nullify here to preserve across renders,
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        // unless we want to rebuild them on every render.
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        // It's safe leaving them as is. Cleanup on unmount does the nullifying.
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    };
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  }, []); // Remove isListening dependency because we use isListeningRef.current
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  const toggleVoiceSearch = useCallback(() => {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    if (!recognitionRef.current) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      alert("Speech recognition is not supported in this browser.");
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      return;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    if (isListening) {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      setIsListening(false);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      isListeningRef.current = false;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      try {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        recognitionRef.current.stop();
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      } catch(e) {}
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    } else {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      setIsListening(true);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      isListeningRef.current = true;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      try {
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:        recognitionRef.current.start();
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:      } catch(e) {}
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    }
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  }, [isListening]);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  const startListening = useCallback(() => {

src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    setIsListening(true);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    isListeningRef.current = true;
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:    try { recognitionRef.current.start(); } catch(e) {}
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  }, [isListening]);
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:
src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts:  return {

src/App.tsx:// --- Utilities ---
src/App.tsx:const toBengaliNumber = (num: number | string | undefined | null): string => {
src/App.tsx:  if (num === undefined || num === null) return '';
src/App.tsx:  const bengaliDigits = ['০', '১', '২', '৩', '৪', '৫', '৬', '৭', '৮', '৯'];
src/App.tsx:  return num.toString().replace(/\d/g, (digit) => bengaliDigits[parseInt(digit)]);
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const toArabicNumber = (num: number | string | undefined | null): string => {
src/App.tsx:  if (num === undefined || num === null) return '';
src/App.tsx:  const arabicDigits = ['٠', '١', '٢', '٣', '٤', '٥', '٦', '٧', '٨', '٩'];
src/App.tsx:  return num.toString().replace(/\d/g, (digit) => arabicDigits[parseInt(digit)]);
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const safeDate = (timestamp: any): Date => {
src/App.tsx:  if (!timestamp) return new Date();
src/App.tsx:  if (timestamp.toDate && typeof timestamp.toDate === 'function') return timestamp.toDate();
src/App.tsx:  if (timestamp instanceof Date) return timestamp;
src/App.tsx:  if (typeof timestamp === 'number') return new Date(timestamp);
src/App.tsx:  if (timestamp.seconds !== undefined) {
src/App.tsx:    return new Date(timestamp.seconds * 1000 + (timestamp.nanoseconds || 0) / 1000000);
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:  return new Date(timestamp);
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const generateInvoiceId = (): string => {
src/App.tsx:  const now = new Date();
src/App.tsx:  // Formula: time (h:mm) + date (dd) + month (MM) + year (yy)
src/App.tsx:  // Example: 9:29 on 24th April 2026 -> 929240426
src/App.tsx:  return format(now, 'hmmddMMyy');
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const formatCurrency = (amount: number | undefined | null, symbol: string = 'TK', lang: string = 'bn'): string => {
src/App.tsx:  const safeAmount = amount || 0;
src/App.tsx:  const formattedAmount = safeAmount.toFixed(2);
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  if (lang === 'bn') {
src/App.tsx:    return `${symbol} ${toBengaliNumber(formattedAmount)}`;
src/App.tsx:  } else if (lang === 'ar') {
src/App.tsx:    // Basic Arabic number conversion or just use native toLocaleString if browser supports
src/App.tsx:    return `${symbol} ${toArabicNumber(formattedAmount)}`;
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:  return `${symbol} ${formattedAmount}`;
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:export const fC = (amount: number | undefined | null) => {
src/App.tsx:  // A simple fallback for any component that needs it. We try to read global window settings if possible.
src/App.tsx:  // We'll rely on the fact that formatCurrency formats reasonably even without custom symbol if not available.
src/App.tsx:  const symbol = (window as any)._globalCurrencySymbol || 'TK';
src/App.tsx:  const lang = (window as any)._globalLang || 'bn';
src/App.tsx:  return formatCurrency(amount, symbol, lang);
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const fileToBase64 = (file: File): Promise<string> => {
src/App.tsx:  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
src/App.tsx:    const reader = new FileReader();
src/App.tsx:    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/App.tsx:    reader.onload = (event) => {
src/App.tsx:      const img = new Image();
src/App.tsx:      img.onload = () => {
src/App.tsx:        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
src/App.tsx:        const MAX_WIDTH = 800;
src/App.tsx:        const MAX_HEIGHT = 800;
src/App.tsx:        let width = img.width;
src/App.tsx:        let height = img.height;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        if (width > height) {
src/App.tsx:          if (width > MAX_WIDTH) {
src/App.tsx:            height *= MAX_WIDTH / width;
src/App.tsx:            width = MAX_WIDTH;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          if (height > MAX_HEIGHT) {
src/App.tsx:            width *= MAX_HEIGHT / height;
src/App.tsx:            height = MAX_HEIGHT;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        canvas.width = width;
src/App.tsx:        canvas.height = height;
src/App.tsx:        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/App.tsx:        if (ctx) {
src/App.tsx:          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
src/App.tsx:          resolve(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.8)); // compress to JPEG 80% quality
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          resolve(reader.result as string); // fallback
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:      img.onerror = () => resolve(reader.result as string);
src/App.tsx:      img.src = event.target?.result as string;
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:    reader.onerror = error => reject(error);
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:      </td>

src/App.tsx:const callWhatsAppApi = async (phone: string, message: string, settings: ShopSettings) => {
src/App.tsx:  const method = settings.waGatewayType || 'manual';
src/App.tsx:  const cleanPhone = phone.replace(/\D/g, '');
src/App.tsx:  const formattedPhone = cleanPhone.startsWith('880') ? cleanPhone : `880${cleanPhone.startsWith('0') ? cleanPhone.slice(1) : cleanPhone}`;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  if (method !== 'manual' && settings.waToken) {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      let finalResponse;
src/App.tsx:      if (method === 'metacloud' && settings.waPhoneNumberId) {
src/App.tsx:        const url = `https://graph.facebook.com/v20.0/${settings.waPhoneNumberId}/messages`;
src/App.tsx:        finalResponse = await fetch(url, {
src/App.tsx:          method: 'POST',
src/App.tsx:          headers: {
src/App.tsx:            'Authorization': `Bearer ${settings.waToken}`,
src/App.tsx:            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
src/App.tsx:          },
src/App.tsx:          body: JSON.stringify({
src/App.tsx:            messaging_product: "whatsapp",
src/App.tsx:            recipient_type: "individual",
src/App.tsx:            to: formattedPhone,
src/App.tsx:            type: "text",
src/App.tsx:            text: { body: message }
src/App.tsx:          })
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      } else if (method === 'generic' && settings.waApiUrl) {
src/App.tsx:        let body: any = {};
src/App.tsx:        if (settings.waApiUrl?.includes('ultramsg')) {
src/App.tsx:          body = { token: settings.waToken, to: formattedPhone, body: message };
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          body = { instance: settings.waInstanceId, token: settings.waToken, to: formattedPhone, message };
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        finalResponse = await fetch(settings.waApiUrl, {
src/App.tsx:          method: 'POST',
src/App.tsx:          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/App.tsx:          body: JSON.stringify(body)
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (finalResponse) {
src/App.tsx:        const result = await finalResponse.json();
src/App.tsx:        if (finalResponse.ok) {
src/App.tsx:          return { success: true, result };
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          return { success: false, error: result };
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      return { success: false, error };
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Fallback to manual
src/App.tsx:  if (isMobile) {
src/App.tsx:    window.open(`https://wa.me/${formattedPhone}?text=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`, '_blank');
src/App.tsx:  } else {
src/App.tsx:    window.open(`https://web.whatsapp.com/send?phone=${formattedPhone}&text=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`, '_blank');
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:  return { success: true, fallback: true };
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const generatePersonalizedMessage = async (customer: Customer | null | undefined, sale: Sale | null, type: 'invoice' | 'reminder', lang: 'en' | 'bn' | 'ar', settings: ShopSettings) => {

src/App.tsx:    if (!process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY) {
src/App.tsx:      console.warn("GEMINI_API_KEY is not defined. Falling back to template.");

src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:Generate a personalized WhatsApp message for a customer.
src/App.tsx:Type of message: ${type === 'invoice' ? 'New Invoice/Purchase Confirmation' : 'Due Payment Reminder'}
src/App.tsx:Language: ${lang === 'bn' ? 'Bengali' : (lang === 'ar' ? 'Arabic' : 'English')}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:Customer Data:
src/App.tsx:Name: ${customer?.name || sale?.customerName || 'Valued Customer'}
src/App.tsx:Total Due: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${customer?.currentDue || (sale ? (sale.finalAmount + (sale.previousBalance || 0) - (sale.paidAmount || 0)) : 0)}`;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (type === 'invoice' && sale) {

src/App.tsx:Sale Data:
src/App.tsx:Invoice ID: ${sale.id || 'N/A'}
src/App.tsx:Purchase Amount: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${sale.finalAmount}

src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:Do NOT include any markdown blocks, JSON format, or preamble like "Here is the message". Return ONLY the actual WhatsApp message text.`;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
src/App.tsx:      model: "gemini-flash-latest",

src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:      return response.text.trim();
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    return null;
src/App.tsx:  } catch (error) {

src/App.tsx:const sendWhatsAppInvoice = async (sale: Sale, settings: ShopSettings, lang: 'en' | 'bn' | 'ar' = 'en') => {
src/App.tsx:  if (!sale.customerPhone) return;
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  let message = "";
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  if (settings.aiWhatsAppEnabled) {
src/App.tsx:    const aiMsg = await generatePersonalizedMessage(null, sale, 'invoice', lang, settings);
src/App.tsx:    if (aiMsg) message = aiMsg;
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  if (!message) {
src/App.tsx:    const template = lang === 'bn' ? (settings.waTemplateBengali || "") : (settings.waTemplateEnglish || "");
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const previousBalance = sale.previousBalance || 0;
src/App.tsx:    const currentBalance = sale.finalAmount + previousBalance - (sale.paidAmount || 0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Prepare variables
src/App.tsx:    const variables: { [key: string]: string } = {
src/App.tsx:      '{{customerName}}': sale.customerName || 'Customer',
src/App.tsx:      '{{shopName}}': settings.name || 'Shop',
src/App.tsx:      '{{invoiceId}}': sale.id,
src/App.tsx:      '{{totalAmount}}': sale.finalAmount.toString(),
src/App.tsx:      '{{currencySymbol}}': settings.currencySymbol || 'TK',
src/App.tsx:      '{{discount}}': sale.discount ? sale.discount.toString() : '0',
src/App.tsx:      '{{paidAmount}}': sale.paidAmount.toString(),
src/App.tsx:      '{{dueAmount}}': (sale.finalAmount - sale.paidAmount).toString(),
src/App.tsx:      '{{prevBalance}}': previousBalance.toString(),
src/App.tsx:      '{{currentBalance}}': currentBalance.toString(),
src/App.tsx:      '{{items}}': sale.items.map(item => `• ${item.productName}: ${item.quantity} x ${item.price}`).join('\n')
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Replace variables
src/App.tsx:    message = template;
src/App.tsx:    Object.keys(variables).forEach(key => {
src/App.tsx:      message = message.replace(new RegExp(key, 'g'), variables[key]);
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Fallback if template is not configured or just too simple
src/App.tsx:    if (!template || message === template) {
src/App.tsx:      const itemsText = sale.items.map(item => `• ${item.productName}: ${item.quantity} x ${item.price} = ${item.price * item.quantity}`).join('\n');
src/App.tsx:      const previousBalance = sale.previousBalance || 0;
src/App.tsx:      message = `*আমাদের স্টোর ${settings.name} থেকে ইনভয়েস*\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `ইনভয়েস: #${sale.id}\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `তারিখ: ${format(safeDate(sale.timestamp), 'dd/MM/yyyy')}\n\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `*আইটেমসমূহ:*\n${itemsText}\n\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `--------------------------\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `*টোটাল প্রোডাক্ট বিল:* ${settings.currencySymbol} ${sale.totalAmount}\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `*ডিসকাউন্ট:* ${settings.currencySymbol} ${sale.discount}\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `*গ্র্যান্ড টোটাল:* ${settings.currencySymbol} ${sale.finalAmount}\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `*আজকের জমা:* ${settings.currencySymbol} ${sale.paidAmount}\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `--------------------------\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `*পূর্বের বাকি:* ${settings.currencySymbol} ${previousBalance}\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `*আজকের বিল:* ${settings.currencySymbol} ${sale.finalAmount}\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `*টোটাল বাকি:* ${settings.currencySymbol} ${(sale.finalAmount + previousBalance - (sale.paidAmount || 0))}\n\n` +
src/App.tsx:        `আপনার কেনাকাটার জন্য ধন্যবাদ!`;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const result = await callWhatsAppApi(sale.customerPhone, message, settings);
src/App.tsx:  if (!result.fallback) {
src/App.tsx:    if (result.success) {
src/App.tsx:      console.log('✅ WhatsApp invoice sent automatically.');
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      const errorMsg = typeof result.error === 'string' ? result.error : (result.error as any)?.message || 'Unknown error';
src/App.tsx:      if (errorMsg === 'Failed to fetch') {
src/App.tsx:        console.warn('❌ Automatic delivery skipped: No internet connection or API unreachable.');
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        console.error('❌ Automatic delivery failed:', result.error);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:};

src/App.tsx:const downloadInvoicePDF = (sale: Sale, settings: ShopSettings) => {
src/App.tsx:  const doc = new jsPDF();
src/App.tsx:  const pageWidth = doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Header
src/App.tsx:  doc.setFontSize(22);
src/App.tsx:  doc.text(settings.name, pageWidth / 2, 20, { align: 'center' });
src/App.tsx:  doc.setFontSize(10);
src/App.tsx:  doc.text(settings.address, pageWidth / 2, 28, { align: 'center' });
src/App.tsx:  if (settings.phone) doc.text(`Phone: ${settings.phone}`, pageWidth / 2, 34, { align: 'center' });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  doc.setLineWidth(0.5);
src/App.tsx:  doc.line(20, 40, pageWidth - 20, 40);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Invoice Info
src/App.tsx:  doc.setFontSize(12);
src/App.tsx:  doc.text(`Invoice: #${sale.id}`, 20, 50);
src/App.tsx:  doc.text(`Date: ${format(safeDate(sale.timestamp), 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm')}`, pageWidth - 20, 50, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:  doc.text(`Customer: ${sale.customerName || 'Walk-in'}`, 20, 58);
src/App.tsx:  if (sale.customerPhone) doc.text(`Phone: ${sale.customerPhone}`, 20, 64);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Table
src/App.tsx:  const tableData = sale.items.map(item => [
src/App.tsx:    item.productName,
src/App.tsx:    (item.quantity || 0).toString(),
src/App.tsx:    (item.price || 0).toFixed(2),
src/App.tsx:    ((item.price || 0) * (item.quantity || 0)).toFixed(2)
src/App.tsx:  ]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  autoTable(doc, {
src/App.tsx:    startY: 75,
src/App.tsx:    head: [['Product', 'Qty', 'Price', 'Total']],
src/App.tsx:    body: tableData,
src/App.tsx:    theme: 'striped',
src/App.tsx:    headStyles: { fillColor: [79, 70, 229] }
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const finalY = (doc as any).lastAutoTable.finalY + 10;
src/App.tsx:  const changeAmount = Math.max(0, (sale.paidAmount || 0) - (sale.finalAmount || 0));
src/App.tsx:  const previousBalance = sale.previousBalance || 0;
src/App.tsx:  const newBalance = previousBalance + (sale.dueAmount || 0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Totals
src/App.tsx:  let currentY = finalY;
src/App.tsx:  doc.text(`Subtotal: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${(sale.totalAmount || 0).toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, currentY, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:  currentY += 6;
src/App.tsx:  doc.text(`Discount: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${(sale.discount || 0).toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, currentY, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:  currentY += 6;
src/App.tsx:  if (sale.taxAmount) {
src/App.tsx:    doc.text(`Tax (VAT)${sale.taxRate ? ` (${sale.taxRate}%)` : ''}: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${(sale.taxAmount).toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, currentY, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:    currentY += 6;
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  doc.setFontSize(14);
src/App.tsx:  currentY += 2; // Extra padding
src/App.tsx:  doc.text(`Grand Total: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${(sale.finalAmount || 0).toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, currentY, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  doc.setFontSize(10);
src/App.tsx:  currentY += 6;
src/App.tsx:  doc.text(`Paid Today: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${(sale.paidAmount || 0).toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, currentY, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  if (changeAmount > 0 && !sale.customerId) {
src/App.tsx:    currentY += 6;
src/App.tsx:    doc.text(`Change Given: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${changeAmount.toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, currentY, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  currentY += 6;
src/App.tsx:  doc.text(`REMAINING DUE: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${(sale.finalAmount + previousBalance - (sale.paidAmount || 0)).toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, currentY, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  if (sale.customerId) {
src/App.tsx:    const balanceY = currentY + 10;
src/App.tsx:    doc.setFontSize(11);
src/App.tsx:    doc.text('Customer Balance Summary', pageWidth - 20, balanceY, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:    doc.setFontSize(9);
src/App.tsx:    doc.text(`Today's Bill: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${(sale.finalAmount || 0).toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, balanceY + 6, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:    doc.text(`Previous Due: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${previousBalance.toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, balanceY + 12, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:    doc.text(`Total Before Payment: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${(sale.finalAmount + previousBalance).toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, balanceY + 18, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:    doc.text(`Payment Today: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${(sale.paidAmount || 0).toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, balanceY + 24, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:    doc.setFontSize(10);
src/App.tsx:    doc.text(`TOTAL REMAINING: ${settings.currencySymbol} ${(sale.finalAmount + previousBalance - (sale.paidAmount || 0)).toFixed(2)}`, pageWidth - 20, balanceY + 32, { align: 'right' });
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const footerText = settings.receiptFooter || "Thank you for shopping with us!\nPowered by ShopMaster";
src/App.tsx:  const footerLines = footerText.split('\n');
src/App.tsx:  footerLines.forEach((line, index) => {
src/App.tsx:    doc.text(line, pageWidth / 2, finalY + 70 + (index * 6), { align: 'center' });
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  doc.save(`Invoice_${sale.id}.pdf`);
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:// --- Voice Command Parsing Helpers ---
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:function parseVoiceCommandQuantity(text: string): { originalText: string, searchName: string, quantity: number, matchFound: boolean } {
src/App.tsx:  const result = { originalText: text, searchName: text, quantity: 1, matchFound: false };
src/App.tsx:  const lower = text.toLowerCase().trim();
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Handle Bengali quantity patterns like "৫ কেজি চিনি" or "৫টি সাবান" or "১০ টা ডিম"
src/App.tsx:  const bnQtyRegex = /^(\d+)\s*(কেজি|গ্রাম|লিটার|মিলি|পিস|টি|টা|মি|গজ|কে|প|ট)\s*(?:করে|ও)?\s*(.+)$/i;
src/App.tsx:  const bnMatch = lower.match(bnQtyRegex);
src/App.tsx:  if (bnMatch) {
src/App.tsx:    result.quantity = parseInt(bnMatch[1]);
src/App.tsx:    result.searchName = bnMatch[3].trim();
src/App.tsx:    result.matchFound = true;
src/App.tsx:    return result;
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Handle "এক কেজি চিনি" style
src/App.tsx:  const bnWordMap: {[key: string]: number} = { 'একটা': 1, 'এক': 1, 'দুই': 2, 'তিন': 3, 'চার': 4, 'পাঁচ': 5, 'ছয়': 6, 'সাত': 7, 'আট': 8, 'নয়': 9, 'দশ': 10 };
src/App.tsx:  for (const word in bnWordMap) {
src/App.tsx:    if (lower.startsWith(word)) {
src/App.tsx:      const remaining = lower.substring(word.length).trim();
src/App.tsx:      const units = ['কেজি', 'টা', 'টি', 'পিস'];
src/App.tsx:      for (const u of units) {
src/App.tsx:        if (remaining.startsWith(u)) {
src/App.tsx:          result.quantity = bnWordMap[word];
src/App.tsx:          result.searchName = remaining.substring(u.length).trim();
src/App.tsx:          result.matchFound = true;
src/App.tsx:          return result;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Handle English patterns like "5kg sugar" or "add 2 soaps" or "10 items of milk"
src/App.tsx:  const enQtyRegex = /^(?:add\s+)?(\d+)\s*(?:kg|kg\s+of|units\s+of|items\s+of|x|pcs|packs?|grams?|liter?s?|ml)?\s*(.+)$/i;
src/App.tsx:  const enMatch = lower.match(enQtyRegex);
src/App.tsx:  if (enMatch) {
src/App.tsx:    result.quantity = parseInt(enMatch[1]);
src/App.tsx:    result.searchName = enMatch[2].trim();
src/App.tsx:    result.matchFound = true;
src/App.tsx:    return result;
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Pattern like "Sugar 5kg"
src/App.tsx:  const reverseEnRegex = /^(.+)\s+(\d+)\s*(?:kg|pcs|x|units|packs?)$/i;
src/App.tsx:  const revMatch = lower.match(reverseEnRegex);
src/App.tsx:  if (revMatch) {
src/App.tsx:    result.searchName = revMatch[1].trim();
src/App.tsx:    result.quantity = parseInt(revMatch[2]);
src/App.tsx:    result.matchFound = true;
src/App.tsx:    return result;
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return result;
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:async function parseNewProductVoiceCommand(rawText: string, categories: string[]): Promise<{
src/App.tsx:  name?: string,
src/App.tsx:  price?: number,
src/App.tsx:  stock?: number,
src/App.tsx:  category?: string,
src/App.tsx:  unit?: string
src/App.tsx:} | null> {
src/App.tsx:  if (!process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY) return null;
src/App.tsx:  try {
src/App.tsx:    const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey: process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY });
src/App.tsx:    const prompt = `
src/App.tsx:      Extract product details from this voice command: "${rawText}"
src/App.tsx:      Available categories: ${categories.join(', ')}
src/App.tsx:      If a category isn't exact, pick the closest one or "General".
src/App.tsx:      Support English, Bengali, and Arabic input.
src/App.tsx:      Return JSON: { "name": "...", "price": 10, "stock": 100, "category": "...", "unit": "kg/pcs" }
src/App.tsx:    `;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
src/App.tsx:      model: "gemini-flash-latest",
src/App.tsx:      contents: prompt,
src/App.tsx:      config: {
src/App.tsx:        responseMimeType: "application/json",
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (response && response.text) {
src/App.tsx:      const text = response.text;
src/App.tsx:      const jsonStr = text.replace(/```json|```/g, '').trim();
src/App.tsx:      return JSON.parse(jsonStr);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    return null;
src/App.tsx:  } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:    console.error("New product AI Error:", err);
src/App.tsx:    return null;
src/App.tsx:  }

src/App.tsx:const ErrorBoundary = ({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) => {

src/App.tsx:  const [errorInfo, setErrorInfo] = useState<string | null>(null);

src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

src/App.tsx:        if (parsed.error) {

src/App.tsx:          setErrorInfo(parsed.error);
src/App.tsx:        }

src/App.tsx:        // Not a firestore error
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:    window.addEventListener('error', handleError);
src/App.tsx:    return () => window.removeEventListener('error', handleError);
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  if (hasError) {

src/App.tsx:            onClick={() => window.location.reload()}

src/App.tsx:            Reload Application

src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      </div>

src/App.tsx:  const syncOfflineData = async () => {

src/App.tsx:    if (queue.length === 0) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    console.log(`Syncing ${queue.length} offline operations...`);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    for (const item of queue) {
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        if (item.type === 'sale') {
src/App.tsx:          const { saleData, customId, cart } = item.data;
src/App.tsx:          // Create sale
src/App.tsx:          await setDoc(doc(db, 'sales', customId), {
src/App.tsx:            ...saleData,
src/App.tsx:            timestamp: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          // Update stock
src/App.tsx:          for (const cartItem of cart) {
src/App.tsx:            await updateDoc(doc(db, 'products', cartItem.id), {
src/App.tsx:              stock: increment(-cartItem.quantity)
src/App.tsx:            });
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          // Update customer if exists
src/App.tsx:          if (saleData.customerId) {
src/App.tsx:            const customerRef = doc(db, 'customers', saleData.customerId);
src/App.tsx:            await updateDoc(customerRef, {
src/App.tsx:              currentDue: increment(saleData.dueAmount),
src/App.tsx:              totalSpent: increment(saleData.finalAmount)
src/App.tsx:            });
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        } else if (item.type === 'payment') {
src/App.tsx:          const { paymentData, customerId, amount } = item.data;
src/App.tsx:          await addDoc(collection(db, 'due_payments'), {
src/App.tsx:            ...paymentData,
src/App.tsx:            timestamp: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:          await updateDoc(doc(db, 'customers', customerId), {
src/App.tsx:            currentDue: increment(-amount)
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        } else if (item.type === 'customer') {
src/App.tsx:          const { customerData, customId } = item.data;
src/App.tsx:          await setDoc(doc(db, 'customers', customId), {
src/App.tsx:            ...customerData,
src/App.tsx:            timestamp: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        } else if (item.type === 'customer_update') {

src/App.tsx:          await updateDoc(doc(db, 'customers', customerId), customerData);

src/App.tsx:              ...logData,
src/App.tsx:              timestamp: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:            });
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        await removeFromSyncQueue(item.id!);

src/App.tsx:    try {

src/App.tsx:      }

src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:        contents: prompt

src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {

src/App.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (firebaseUser) => {
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(true);
src/App.tsx:      if (firebaseUser && !firebaseUser.isAnonymous) {
src/App.tsx:        const isMaster = firebaseUser.email?.toLowerCase().trim() === 'stratproamz@gmail.com';
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        if (isMaster) {
src/App.tsx:            uid: firebaseUser.uid,
src/App.tsx:            email: firebaseUser.email || '',

src/App.tsx:            role: 'admin',
src/App.tsx:            shopId: 'master'
src/App.tsx:          };
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          try {
src/App.tsx:                uid: firebaseUser.uid,
src/App.tsx:                email: firebaseUser.email || '',
src/App.tsx:                role: data.role || 'sales_team',
src/App.tsx:                shopId: data.shopId
src/App.tsx:              };
src/App.tsx:            } else {
src/App.tsx:              // Might be a Merchant (logged in via Google or first time)
src/App.tsx:                uid: firebaseUser.uid,
src/App.tsx:                email: firebaseUser.email || '',
src/App.tsx:                displayName: firebaseUser.displayName || 'Merchant',
src/App.tsx:                role: 'admin',
src/App.tsx:                shopId: firebaseUser.uid // Merchants use their UID as shopId
src/App.tsx:              };
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:          } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:            // Fallback to basic data
src/App.tsx:              uid: firebaseUser.uid,
src/App.tsx:              email: firebaseUser.email || '',
src/App.tsx:              displayName: firebaseUser.displayName || 'User',
src/App.tsx:              role: 'sales_team',
src/App.tsx:              shopId: firebaseUser.uid
src/App.tsx:            };
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }

src/App.tsx:        // Logged out or Anonymous
src/App.tsx:        setUser(null);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();
src/App.tsx:  }, []);

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // --- POS Logic ---
src/App.tsx:  const calculateItemPrice = (product: Product, quantity: number) => {
src/App.tsx:    let price = product.price;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Custom logic for 1kg = 20 TK base
src/App.tsx:    // If base price is 20:
src/App.tsx:    // 0.5kg = 11
src/App.tsx:    // 0.25kg = 7
src/App.tsx:    // 2kg+ = 19 per kg (1 TK discount)
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const basePrice = product.price;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (product.unit === 'kg') {
src/App.tsx:      if (quantity >= 2) {
src/App.tsx:        // Bulk discount: 1 TK less per kg if 2kg or more
src/App.tsx:        price = basePrice - 1;
src/App.tsx:      } else if (quantity === 0.5) {
src/App.tsx:        // Half kg logic: if 1kg is 20, 0.5kg is 11
src/App.tsx:        // This is roughly (base/2) + 1
src/App.tsx:        price = (basePrice / 2) + 1;
src/App.tsx:      } else if (quantity === 0.25) {
src/App.tsx:        // 250g logic: if 1kg is 20, 0.25kg is 7
src/App.tsx:        // This is roughly (base/4) + 2
src/App.tsx:        price = (basePrice / 4) + 2;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } else if (product.unit === 'unit') {
src/App.tsx:      if (quantity >= 5) {
src/App.tsx:        price = basePrice - 1;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    return price;
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const addToCart = (product: Product, qty: number = 1) => {
src/App.tsx:    setCart(prev => {
src/App.tsx:      const existing = prev.find(item => item.id === product.id);
src/App.tsx:      if (existing) {
src/App.tsx:        const newQty = existing.quantity + qty;
src/App.tsx:        const newPrice = calculateItemPrice(product, newQty);
src/App.tsx:        return prev.map(item => 
src/App.tsx:          item.id === product.id 
src/App.tsx:            ? { ...item, quantity: newQty, discountedPrice: newPrice } 
src/App.tsx:            : item
src/App.tsx:        );
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      const initialPrice = calculateItemPrice(product, qty);
src/App.tsx:      return [...prev, { ...product, quantity: qty, originalPrice: product.price, discountedPrice: initialPrice }];
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const removeFromCart = (productId: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    setCart(prev => prev.filter(item => item.id !== productId));
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const updateCartQuantity = (productId: string, delta: number) => {
src/App.tsx:    setCart(prev => prev.map(item => {
src/App.tsx:      if (item.id === productId) {
src/App.tsx:        const newQty = Math.max(0.1, item.quantity + delta);
src/App.tsx:        // Only auto-calculate price if it hasn't been manually overridden
src/App.tsx:        // For simplicity, we'll re-calculate if delta is used, but allow manual override
src/App.tsx:        const newPrice = calculateItemPrice(item, newQty);
src/App.tsx:        return { ...item, quantity: newQty, discountedPrice: newPrice };
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      return item;
src/App.tsx:    }));
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const updateCartQuantityManual = (productId: string, quantity: number) => {
src/App.tsx:    setCart(prev => prev.map(item => {
src/App.tsx:      if (item.id === productId) {
src/App.tsx:        const newQty = Math.max(0, quantity);
src/App.tsx:        const newPrice = calculateItemPrice(item, newQty);
src/App.tsx:        return { ...item, quantity: newQty, discountedPrice: newPrice };
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      return item;
src/App.tsx:    }));
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const updateCartPriceManual = (productId: string, price: number) => {
src/App.tsx:    setCart(prev => prev.map(item => {
src/App.tsx:      if (item.id === productId) {
src/App.tsx:        return { ...item, discountedPrice: Math.max(0, price) };
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      return item;
src/App.tsx:    }));
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const updateCartLineTotalManual = (productId: string, total: number) => {
src/App.tsx:    setCart(prev => prev.map(item => {
src/App.tsx:      if (item.id === productId) {
src/App.tsx:        // If quantity is 0 or less, avoid division by zero, just set quantity to 1 implicitly for Calculation mapping or keep it simple
src/App.tsx:        const qty = item.quantity > 0 ? item.quantity : 1;
src/App.tsx:        const newUnitPrice = Math.max(0, total) / qty;
src/App.tsx:        return { ...item, discountedPrice: newUnitPrice };
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      return item;
src/App.tsx:    }));
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const [showReceiptModal, setShowReceiptModal] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [lastCompletedSale, setLastCompletedSale] = useState<Sale | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const cartTotal = useMemo(() => cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.discountedPrice * item.quantity), 0), [cart]);
src/App.tsx:  const finalTotalBeforeTax = Math.max(0, cartTotal - discount);
src/App.tsx:  const taxAmount = (finalTotalBeforeTax * taxRate) / 100;
src/App.tsx:  const finalTotal = finalTotalBeforeTax + taxAmount;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const [checkoutData, setCheckoutData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:    customerId: '',
src/App.tsx:    walkInName: '',
src/App.tsx:    walkInPhone: '',
src/App.tsx:    paidAmount: 0,
src/App.tsx:    paymentMethod: 'cash' as 'cash' | 'due'
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Automatic Customer Selection
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (checkoutData.walkInName || checkoutData.walkInPhone) {
src/App.tsx:      const matchingCustomer = customers.find(c => 
src/App.tsx:        (checkoutData.walkInName && c.name.toLowerCase() === checkoutData.walkInName.toLowerCase()) ||
src/App.tsx:        (checkoutData.walkInPhone && c.phone === checkoutData.walkInPhone)
src/App.tsx:      );
src/App.tsx:      if (matchingCustomer && checkoutData.customerId !== matchingCustomer.id) {
src/App.tsx:        setCheckoutData(prev => ({...prev, customerId: matchingCustomer.id}));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }, [checkoutData.walkInName, checkoutData.walkInPhone, customers]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleCheckout = async (sendWhatsApp: boolean = false) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (cart.length === 0) return;
src/App.tsx:    setIsCheckingOut(true);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const selectedCustomer = customers.find(c => c.id === checkoutData.customerId);
src/App.tsx:      const paidAmount = checkoutData.paidAmount || 0;
src/App.tsx:      const currentLang = shopSettings.systemLanguage || 'bn';
src/App.tsx:      const defaultRetailName = currentLang === 'bn' ? 'নগদ ক্রেতা (Walk-in)' : (currentLang === 'ar' ? 'عميل عابر' : 'Retail Sale (Walk-in)');
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Enforce full payment for walk-in customers
src/App.tsx:      if (!checkoutData.customerId && paidAmount < finalTotal) {
src/App.tsx:        setNotification({ message: "Walk-in customers must pay in full!", type: 'error' });
src/App.tsx:        setIsCheckingOut(false);
src/App.tsx:        return;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const dueAmount = finalTotal - paidAmount;
src/App.tsx:      const previousBalance = selectedCustomer?.currentDue || 0;
src/App.tsx:      const newBalance = previousBalance + dueAmount;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Revert old sale effects if editing
src/App.tsx:      if (editingSale) {
src/App.tsx:        for (const item of editingSale.items) {
src/App.tsx:          if (item.productId) {
src/App.tsx:            const productRef = doc(db, 'products', item.productId);
src/App.tsx:            await updateDoc(productRef, { stock: increment(item.quantity || 0) });
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        if (editingSale.customerId) {
src/App.tsx:          const customerRef = doc(db, 'customers', editingSale.customerId);
src/App.tsx:          await updateDoc(customerRef, {
src/App.tsx:            currentDue: increment(-(editingSale.dueAmount || 0)),
src/App.tsx:            totalSpent: increment(-(editingSale.finalAmount || 0))
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const saleData: any = {
src/App.tsx:        customerName: selectedCustomer?.name || checkoutData.walkInName || defaultRetailName,
src/App.tsx:        customerPhone: selectedCustomer?.phone || checkoutData.walkInPhone || '',
src/App.tsx:        items: cart.map(item => ({
src/App.tsx:          productId: item.id || '',
src/App.tsx:          productName: item.name || 'Unknown Product',
src/App.tsx:          quantity: item.quantity || 0,
src/App.tsx:          unit: item.unit || 'unit',
src/App.tsx:          price: item.discountedPrice || 0,
src/App.tsx:          originalPrice: item.originalPrice || 0,
src/App.tsx:          cost: item.cost || 0
src/App.tsx:        })),
src/App.tsx:        totalAmount: cartTotal,
src/App.tsx:        discount: discount,
src/App.tsx:        taxRate: taxRate,
src/App.tsx:        taxAmount: taxAmount,
src/App.tsx:        finalAmount: finalTotal,
src/App.tsx:        paidAmount: checkoutData.paidAmount || 0,
src/App.tsx:        dueAmount: dueAmount,
src/App.tsx:        previousBalance: selectedCustomer?.currentDue || 0,
src/App.tsx:        paymentMethod: checkoutData.paymentMethod,
src/App.tsx:        timestamp: editingSale ? editingSale.timestamp : new Date(),
src/App.tsx:        sellerId: auth.currentUser?.uid || 'unknown'
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (checkoutData.customerId) {
src/App.tsx:        saleData.customerId = checkoutData.customerId;
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        saleData.customerId = null;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      let finalSale: Sale;
src/App.tsx:      if (!isOnline) {
src/App.tsx:        const customId = generateInvoiceId();
src/App.tsx:        finalSale = { ...saleData, id: customId } as Sale;
src/App.tsx:        await addToSyncQueue('sale', { saleData, customId, cart });
src/App.tsx:        setNotification({ message: "Running Offline: Order queued for sync!", type: 'info' });
src/App.tsx:      } else if (editingSale) {
src/App.tsx:        await updateDoc(doc(db, 'sales', editingSale.id), saleData);
src/App.tsx:        finalSale = { ...saleData, id: editingSale.id } as Sale;
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        const customId = generateInvoiceId();
src/App.tsx:        await setDoc(doc(db, 'sales', customId), saleData);
src/App.tsx:        finalSale = { ...saleData, id: customId } as Sale;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Apply new sale effects locally/immediately if needed, but for now we rely on DB sync
src/App.tsx:      if (isOnline) {
src/App.tsx:        for (const item of cart) {
src/App.tsx:          const productRef = doc(db, 'products', item.id);
src/App.tsx:          await updateDoc(productRef, { stock: increment(-item.quantity) });
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (sendWhatsApp && isOnline) {
src/App.tsx:        await sendWhatsAppInvoice(finalSale, shopSettings, shopSettings.systemLanguage === 'bn' ? 'bn' : (shopSettings.systemLanguage === 'ar' ? 'ar' : 'en'));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (checkoutData.customerId && isOnline) {
src/App.tsx:        const customerRef = doc(db, 'customers', checkoutData.customerId);
src/App.tsx:        const overpayment = checkoutData.paidAmount - finalTotal;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        await updateDoc(customerRef, {
src/App.tsx:          currentDue: increment(finalTotal - checkoutData.paidAmount),
src/App.tsx:          totalSpent: increment(finalTotal)
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Record overpayment in due_payments for history visibility
src/App.tsx:        if (overpayment > 0) {
src/App.tsx:          const prevDue = selectedCustomer?.currentDue || 0;
src/App.tsx:          const remainingDue = prevDue - overpayment;
src/App.tsx:          await addDoc(collection(db, 'due_payments'), {
src/App.tsx:            customerId: checkoutData.customerId,
src/App.tsx:            amount: overpayment,
src/App.tsx:            previousDue: prevDue,
src/App.tsx:            remainingDue: remainingDue,
src/App.tsx:            method: checkoutData.paymentMethod,
src/App.tsx:            timestamp: serverTimestamp(),
src/App.tsx:            note: `Extra payment from Invoice #${finalSale.id}`
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      setLastSale(finalSale);
src/App.tsx:      setLastCompletedSale(finalSale);
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: editingSale ? "Order updated successfully!" : "Order completed successfully!", type: 'success' });
src/App.tsx:      setCart([]);
src/App.tsx:      setDiscount(0);
src/App.tsx:      setTaxRate(0);
src/App.tsx:      setCheckoutData({ customerId: '', walkInName: '', walkInPhone: '', paidAmount: 0, paymentMethod: 'cash' });
src/App.tsx:      setEditingSale(null);
src/App.tsx:      setShowReceiptModal(true);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Auto Send WhatsApp if customer has phone and auto-send is enabled
src/App.tsx:      if (finalSale.customerPhone && shopSettings.autoSendWhatsApp) {
src/App.tsx:        sendWhatsAppInvoice(finalSale, shopSettings, shopSettings.systemLanguage === 'bn' ? 'bn' : (shopSettings.systemLanguage === 'ar' ? 'ar' : 'en'));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.WRITE, 'sales');
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: "Failed to complete transaction. Please try again.", type: 'error' });
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsCheckingOut(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleDeleteSale = async (sale: Sale) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (loading) return;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(true);
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: "Moving invoice to Recycle Bin and reverting balances...", type: 'info' });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Revert stock
src/App.tsx:      if (sale.items && Array.isArray(sale.items)) {
src/App.tsx:        for (const item of sale.items) {
src/App.tsx:          if (item.productId) {
src/App.tsx:            try {
src/App.tsx:              const productRef = doc(db, 'products', item.productId);
src/App.tsx:              await updateDoc(productRef, { 
src/App.tsx:                stock: increment(Number(item.quantity) || 0) 
src/App.tsx:              });
src/App.tsx:            } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:              console.warn(`Could not revert stock for product ${item.productId}:`, e);
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Revert customer balance
src/App.tsx:      if (sale.customerId) {
src/App.tsx:        try {
src/App.tsx:          const customerRef = doc(db, 'customers', sale.customerId);
src/App.tsx:          await updateDoc(customerRef, {
src/App.tsx:            currentDue: increment(-(Number(sale.dueAmount) || 0)),
src/App.tsx:            totalSpent: increment(-(Number(sale.finalAmount) || 0))
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:          console.warn(`Could not revert balance for customer ${sale.customerId}:`, e);
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Move to recycle bin
src/App.tsx:      await moveToRecycleBin('sale', sale.id, sale);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Delete original
src/App.tsx:      await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'sales', sale.id));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: "Invoice moved to Recycle Bin", type: 'success' });
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Delete sale error:", error);
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: `Failed to move invoice to Recycle Bin: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error'}`, type: 'error' });
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleRestoreRecycleItem = async (item: RecycleItem) => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(true);
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: `Restoring ${item.entityType}...`, type: 'info' });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      let targetCollection = '';
src/App.tsx:      switch (item.entityType) {
src/App.tsx:        case 'product': targetCollection = 'products'; break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'sale': targetCollection = 'sales'; break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'customer': targetCollection = 'customers'; break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'expense': targetCollection = 'expenses'; break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'employee': targetCollection = 'employees'; break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'investment': targetCollection = 'investments'; break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'salary': targetCollection = 'staff_salaries'; break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'daily_closing': targetCollection = 'daily_closings'; break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'stockRecord': targetCollection = 'stockRecords'; break;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (!targetCollection) throw new Error("Invalid entity type");
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Restore data with original ID
src/App.tsx:      await setDoc(doc(db, targetCollection, item.originalId), item.data);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // If it was a sale, we might need to re-deduct stock
src/App.tsx:      if (item.entityType === 'sale') {
src/App.tsx:        const sale = item.data as Sale;
src/App.tsx:        if (sale.items && Array.isArray(sale.items)) {
src/App.tsx:          for (const sItem of sale.items) {
src/App.tsx:            if (sItem.productId) {
src/App.tsx:              try {
src/App.tsx:                const productRef = doc(db, 'products', sItem.productId);
src/App.tsx:                await updateDoc(productRef, { 
src/App.tsx:                  stock: increment(-Number(sItem.quantity) || 0) 
src/App.tsx:                });
src/App.tsx:              } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:                console.warn(`Could not deduct stock for restored product ${sItem.productId}:`, e);
src/App.tsx:              }
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        // Re-apply customer balance
src/App.tsx:        if (sale.customerId) {
src/App.tsx:          try {
src/App.tsx:            const customerRef = doc(db, 'customers', sale.customerId);
src/App.tsx:            await updateDoc(customerRef, {
src/App.tsx:              currentDue: increment(sale.totalAmount - sale.paidAmount),
src/App.tsx:              totalSpent: increment(sale.totalAmount)
src/App.tsx:            });
src/App.tsx:          } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:            console.warn(`Could not re-apply balance for restored customer ${sale.customerId}:`, e);
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Delete from recycle bin (Rules must be updated to allow admin to delete before expiry)
src/App.tsx:      await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'recycleBin', item.id));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: `${item.entityType} restored successfully`, type: 'success' });
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Restore error", error);
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.WRITE, `restore_${item.entityType}`);
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        message = `Assalamu Alaikum ${customer.name}, this is a reminder regarding your outstanding due of ${shopSettings.currencySymbol} ${customer.currentDue?.toFixed(2)}. ${customer.dueDate ? `Your promised date was ${format(new Date(customer.dueDate), 'dd MMM yyyy')}.` : ''} Please settle the amount as soon as possible. Thank you!`;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:    const result = await callWhatsAppApi(customer.phone, message, shopSettings);
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    if (result.fallback) {
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: 'Opened WhatsApp manually.', type: 'info' });
src/App.tsx:    } else if (result.success) {

src/App.tsx:    } else {

src/App.tsx:                    } else {

src/App.tsx:                    try {

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:                      // Build cart
src/App.tsx:                      for (const i of saleData.items) {
src/App.tsx:                        const p = fuzzyMatchProduct(products, i.productName);
src/App.tsx:                        if (p) {
src/App.tsx:                          if (p.stock < i.quantity) {
src/App.tsx:                            errorMsg += `Not enough stock for ${p.name}. `;
src/App.tsx:                          } else {
src/App.tsx:                            const price = p.price - (p.discount || 0);
src/App.tsx:                            itemsToSell.push({
src/App.tsx:                              id: p.id,
src/App.tsx:                              name: p.name,
src/App.tsx:                              quantity: i.quantity,
src/App.tsx:                              unit: p.unit || 'unit',
src/App.tsx:                              discountedPrice: price,
src/App.tsx:                              originalPrice: p.price,
src/App.tsx:                              cost: p.cost || 0
src/App.tsx:                            });
src/App.tsx:                            cartTotal += price * i.quantity;
src/App.tsx:                          }
src/App.tsx:                        } else {
src/App.tsx:                          errorMsg += `Product ${i.productName} not found. `;
src/App.tsx:                        }
src/App.tsx:                      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:                      if (itemsToSell.length === 0) {
src/App.tsx:                        return { success: false, error: errorMsg || 'No items to sell.' };
src/App.tsx:                      }

src/App.tsx:                      // Find customer
src/App.tsx:                      let selectedCustomer: Customer | undefined;
src/App.tsx:                      if (saleData.customerPhoneOrName) {

src/App.tsx:                      let paidAmount = saleData.paidAmount;
src/App.tsx:                      if (paidAmount === undefined) paidAmount = finalTotal;
src/App.tsx:                      
src/App.tsx:                      if (!selectedCustomer && paidAmount < finalTotal) {
src/App.tsx:                        return { success: false, error: 'Walk-in customers must pay in full!' };
src/App.tsx:                      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:                      const dueAmount = finalTotal - paidAmount;
src/App.tsx:                      const previousBalance = selectedCustomer?.currentDue || 0;
src/App.tsx:                      const currentLang = shopSettings.systemLanguage || 'bn';
src/App.tsx:                      const defaultRetailName = currentLang === 'bn' ? 'নগদ ক্রেতা (Walk-in)' : 'Retail Sale (Walk-in)';
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:                        customerName: selectedCustomer?.name || defaultRetailName,
src/App.tsx:                        customerPhone: selectedCustomer?.phone || '',
src/App.tsx:                        customerId: selectedCustomer?.id || null,
src/App.tsx:                        items: itemsToSell.map(item => ({
src/App.tsx:                          productId: item.id || '',
src/App.tsx:                          productName: item.name || 'Unknown Product',
src/App.tsx:                          quantity: item.quantity || 0,
src/App.tsx:                          unit: item.unit || 'unit',
src/App.tsx:                          price: item.discountedPrice || 0,
src/App.tsx:                          originalPrice: item.originalPrice || 0,
src/App.tsx:                          cost: item.cost || 0

src/App.tsx:                        discount: 0,
src/App.tsx:                        taxRate: 0,
src/App.tsx:                        taxAmount: 0,
src/App.tsx:                        finalAmount: finalTotal,
src/App.tsx:                        paidAmount: paidAmount,
src/App.tsx:                        dueAmount: dueAmount,
src/App.tsx:                        previousBalance: previousBalance,
src/App.tsx:                        paymentMethod: 'cash',
src/App.tsx:                        timestamp: new Date(),
src/App.tsx:                        sellerId: auth.currentUser?.uid || 'unknown'
src/App.tsx:                      };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:                      let finalSale: Sale;
src/App.tsx:                      if (!isOnline) {
src/App.tsx:                        const customId = generateInvoiceId();
src/App.tsx:                        finalSale = { ...finalSaleData, id: customId } as Sale;
src/App.tsx:                        await addToSyncQueue('sale', { saleData: finalSaleData, customId, cart: itemsToSell });
src/App.tsx:                      } else {
src/App.tsx:                        const customId = generateInvoiceId();
src/App.tsx:                        await setDoc(doc(db, 'sales', customId), finalSaleData);
src/App.tsx:                        finalSale = { ...finalSaleData, id: customId } as Sale;
src/App.tsx:                        
src/App.tsx:                        // Update stock
src/App.tsx:                        for (const item of itemsToSell) {
src/App.tsx:                          const productRef = doc(db, 'products', item.id);
src/App.tsx:                          await updateDoc(productRef, { stock: increment(-item.quantity) });
src/App.tsx:                        }
src/App.tsx:                        
src/App.tsx:                        // Update customer
src/App.tsx:                        if (selectedCustomer) {
src/App.tsx:                          const customerRef = doc(db, 'customers', selectedCustomer.id);
src/App.tsx:                          // We use finalTotal for totalSpent and (finalTotal - paidAmount) for due increment.
src/App.tsx:                          await updateDoc(customerRef, {
src/App.tsx:                            currentDue: increment(finalTotal - paidAmount),
src/App.tsx:                            totalSpent: increment(finalTotal)
src/App.tsx:                          });
src/App.tsx:                        }
src/App.tsx:                      }
src/App.tsx:                      
src/App.tsx:                      if (saleData.printInvoice) {
src/App.tsx:                        printInvoice(finalSale, shopSettings);
src/App.tsx:                      }
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:                        await sendWhatsAppInvoice(finalSale, shopSettings, currentLang as any);
src/App.tsx:                      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:                      return { success: true, total: finalTotal, paid: paidAmount, due: dueAmount };
src/App.tsx:                    } catch (e: any) {
src/App.tsx:                      return { success: false, error: e.message };
src/App.tsx:                    }
src/App.tsx:                  }
src/App.tsx:                }}
src/App.tsx:              />
src/App.tsx:            )}
src/App.tsx:            {activeTab === 'dashboard' && (

src/App.tsx:            {activeTab === 'pos' && (
src/App.tsx:              <POS

src/App.tsx:                            // Simple parser: "Name is X Mobile is Y"
src/App.tsx:                            const nameMatch = transcript.match(/name (is )?([a-zA-Z ]+)/i);
src/App.tsx:                            const phoneMatch = transcript.match(/mobile (is )?([0-9 ]+)/i);

src/App.tsx:                            if (phoneMatch) setCheckoutData(prev => ({...prev, walkInPhone: phoneMatch[2].trim().replace(/\s/g, '')}));
src/App.tsx:                            if (!nameMatch && !phoneMatch) {
src/App.tsx:                              setCheckoutData(prev => ({...prev, walkInName: transcript}));
src/App.tsx:                            }
src/App.tsx:                          };
src/App.tsx:                          rec.start();
src/App.tsx:                        }}
src/App.tsx:                        className={`flex-1 py-4 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all ${isCustomerVoiceListening ? 'bg-red-50 text-red-500 animate-pulse' : 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-400 hover:bg-emerald-50 hover:text-emerald-500'}`}

src/App.tsx:function NotificationToast({ notification, onClose }: { 
src/App.tsx:  notification: { message: string, type: 'success' | 'error' | 'info' } | null, 
src/App.tsx:  onClose: () => void 
src/App.tsx:}) {
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (notification) {
src/App.tsx:      const timer = setTimeout(() => {
src/App.tsx:        onClose();
src/App.tsx:      }, 5000);
src/App.tsx:      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }, [notification, onClose]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-[200] w-full max-w-sm px-4 pointer-events-none">
src/App.tsx:      <AnimatePresence>
src/App.tsx:        {notification && (
src/App.tsx:          <motion.div
src/App.tsx:            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 50, scale: 0.9 }}
