src/App.tsx:function Calculator({ settings, isRtl, isSidebarOpen }: { settings: ShopSettings, isRtl: boolean, isSidebarOpen: boolean }) {
src/App.tsx:  const [display, setDisplay] = useState('0');
src/App.tsx:  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [lastEquation, setLastEquation] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [isAiThinking, setIsAiThinking] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [calcHistory, setCalcHistory] = useState<{ equation: string; result: string; timestamp: string }[]>(() => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const saved = localStorage.getItem('shop_calc_history');
src/App.tsx:      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
src/App.tsx:    } catch {
src/App.tsx:      return [];
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:  const [isAudioFeedbackEnabled, setIsAudioFeedbackEnabled] = useState(true);
src/App.tsx:  const [memory, setMemory] = useState<number>(0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Global listener to easily open calculator from sidebar or head bar
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const handleToggle = () => setIsOpen(prev => !prev);
src/App.tsx:    const handleOpen = () => setIsOpen(true);
src/App.tsx:    const handleClose = () => setIsOpen(false);
src/App.tsx:    window.addEventListener('toggle-calculator', handleToggle);
src/App.tsx:    window.addEventListener('open-calculator', handleOpen);
src/App.tsx:    window.addEventListener('close-calculator', handleClose);
src/App.tsx:    return () => {
src/App.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('toggle-calculator', handleToggle);
src/App.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('open-calculator', handleOpen);
src/App.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('close-calculator', handleClose);
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const saveHistory = (equation: string, result: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    const newRecord = {
src/App.tsx:      equation,
src/App.tsx:      result,
src/App.tsx:      timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:    setCalcHistory(prev => {
src/App.tsx:      const updated = [newRecord, ...prev].slice(0, 50); // limit to 50 records
src/App.tsx:      localStorage.setItem('shop_calc_history', JSON.stringify(updated));
src/App.tsx:      return updated;
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleAction = (val: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (val === 'C') {
src/App.tsx:      setDisplay('0');
src/App.tsx:      setLastEquation(null);
src/App.tsx:    } else if (val === 'del') {
src/App.tsx:      setDisplay(prev => prev.length > 1 ? prev.slice(0, -1) : '0');
src/App.tsx:    } else if (val === '=') {
src/App.tsx:      if (display === '0' || display === 'Error') return;
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        setLastEquation(display);
src/App.tsx:        // eslint-disable-next-line no-new-func
src/App.tsx:        const result = new Function('return ' + display)();
src/App.tsx:        const calculatedStr = String(result ?? '0');
src/App.tsx:        setDisplay(calculatedStr);
src/App.tsx:        saveHistory(display, calculatedStr);
src/App.tsx:        if (isAudioFeedbackEnabled) {
src/App.tsx:          speakNumber(calculatedStr);
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      } catch {
src/App.tsx:        setDisplay('Error');
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } else if (val === 'MC') {
src/App.tsx:      setMemory(0);
src/App.tsx:    } else if (val === 'MR') {
src/App.tsx:      setDisplay(String(memory));
src/App.tsx:    } else if (val === 'M+') {
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        // eslint-disable-next-line no-new-func
src/App.tsx:        const currentVal = new Function('return ' + display)();
src/App.tsx:        setMemory(prev => prev + (Number(currentVal) || 0));
src/App.tsx:      } catch {}
src/App.tsx:    } else if (val === 'M-') {
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        // eslint-disable-next-line no-new-func
src/App.tsx:        const currentVal = new Function('return ' + display)();
src/App.tsx:        setMemory(prev => prev - (Number(currentVal) || 0));
src/App.tsx:      } catch {}
src/App.tsx:    } else if (val === 'sqrt') {
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        // eslint-disable-next-line no-new-func
src/App.tsx:        const currentVal = new Function('return ' + display)();
src/App.tsx:        const root = Math.sqrt(Number(currentVal) || 0);
src/App.tsx:        setDisplay(String(root));
src/App.tsx:        setLastEquation(`√(${display})`);
src/App.tsx:        saveHistory(`√(${display})`, String(root));
src/App.tsx:      } catch {
src/App.tsx:        setDisplay('Error');
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      setDisplay(prev => {
src/App.tsx:        if (prev === 'Error') return val;
src/App.tsx:        if (prev === '0' && !['+', '-', '*', '/', '.', '(', ')', '%'].includes(val)) return val;
src/App.tsx:        return prev + val;
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const speakNumber = (text: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!window.speechSynthesis) return;
src/App.tsx:    window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Convert text numbers to Bengali phrasing if system settings language is 'bn'
src/App.tsx:    let speakText = text;
src/App.tsx:    if (settings.systemLanguage === 'bn') {
src/App.tsx:      speakText = `হিসাবের উত্তর হচ্ছে ${text}`;
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      speakText = `Calculation result is ${text}`;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(speakText);
src/App.tsx:    utterance.lang = settings.systemLanguage === 'bn' ? 'bn-BD' : 'en-US';
src/App.tsx:    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Keyboard integration
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!isOpen) return;
src/App.tsx:    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:      const key = e.key;
src/App.tsx:      if (key >= '0' && key <= '9') {
src/App.tsx:        handleAction(key);
src/App.tsx:      } else if (['+', '-', '*', '/'].includes(key)) {
src/App.tsx:        handleAction(key);
src/App.tsx:      } else if (key === '.') {
src/App.tsx:        handleAction('.');
src/App.tsx:      } else if (key === '(' || key === ')') {
src/App.tsx:        handleAction(key);
src/App.tsx:      } else if (key === 'Enter' || key === '=') {
src/App.tsx:        e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:        handleAction('=');
src/App.tsx:      } else if (key === 'Backspace') {
src/App.tsx:        handleAction('del');
src/App.tsx:      } else if (key === 'Escape') {
src/App.tsx:        handleAction('C');
src/App.tsx:      } else if (key.toLowerCase() === 'c') {
src/App.tsx:        handleAction('C');
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
src/App.tsx:    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
src/App.tsx:  }, [isOpen, display, memory]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const convertBanglaSpokenToMathExpression = (inp: string): string => {
src/App.tsx:    let text = inp.toLowerCase().trim();
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Replace Bengali digits
src/App.tsx:    const bnToEnDigits: { [key: string]: string } = {
src/App.tsx:      '০': '0', '১': '1', '২': '2', '৩': '3', '৪': '4',
src/App.tsx:      '৫': '5', '৬': '6', '৭': '7', '৮': '8', '৯': '9'
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:    text = text.split('').map(char => bnToEnDigits[char] || char).join('');
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Replace Bengali spoken numbers
src/App.tsx:    const verbalMapping: { [key: string]: string } = {
src/App.tsx:      'একশ': '100', 'একশো': '100', 'দুইশ': '200', 'দুইশো': '200', 'তিনশ': '300', 'তিনশো': '300',
src/App.tsx:      'চারশ': '400', 'চারশো': '400', 'পাচশ': '500', 'পাঁচশ': '500', 'পাঁচশো': '500', 'পাচশো': '500',
src/App.tsx:      'ছয়শ': '600', 'ছয়শো': '600', 'সাতশ': '700', 'সাতশো': '700', 'আটশ': '800', 'আটশো': '800',
src/App.tsx:      'নয়শ': '900', 'নয়শো': '900',
src/App.tsx:      'শূন্য': '0', 'এক': '1', 'দুই': '2', 'তিন': '3', 'চার': '4', 'পাঁচ': '5', 'পাচ': '5',
src/App.tsx:      'ছয়': '6', 'সাত': '7', 'আট': '8', 'নয়': '9', 'দশ': '10', 'এগারো': '11', 'বারো': '12',
src/App.tsx:      'তেরো': '13', 'চৌদ্দ': '14', 'পনেরো': '15', 'ষোলো': '16', 'সতেরো': '17', 'আঠারো': '18',
src/App.tsx:      'উনিশ': '19', 'কুড়ি': '20', 'বিশ': '20', 'ত্রিশ': '30', 'চল্লিশ': '40', 'পঞ্চাশ': '50',
src/App.tsx:      'ষাট': '60', 'সত্তর': '70', 'আশি': '80', 'নব্বই': '90', 'হাজার': '000', 'লাখ': '00000'
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const operatorMap: { [key: string]: string } = {
src/App.tsx:      'প্লাস': '+', 'যোগ': '+', 'আরও': '+', 'সাথে': '+', 'এবং': '+',

src/App.tsx:      'ইনটু': '*', 'গুণ': '*', 'গুন': '*',
src/App.tsx:      'ভাগ': '/', 'ডিভাইড': '/', 'বাই': '/'
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const words = text.split(/\s+/);
src/App.tsx:    const resultWords = words.map(word => {
src/App.tsx:      if (verbalMapping[word] !== undefined) return verbalMapping[word];
src/App.tsx:      if (operatorMap[word] !== undefined) return operatorMap[word];
src/App.tsx:      return word;
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    let expr = resultWords.join(' ');
src/App.tsx:    expr = expr.replace(/প্লাস/g, '+').replace(/যোগ/g, '+');
src/App.tsx:    expr = expr.replace(/মাইনাস/g, '-').replace(/বিয়োগ/g, '-');
src/App.tsx:    expr = expr.replace(/গুণ/g, '*').replace(/গুন/g, '*').replace(/ইনটু/g, '*');
src/App.tsx:    expr = expr.replace(/ভাগ/g, '/').replace(/ডিভাইড/g, '/');
src/App.tsx:    expr = expr.replace(/[^0-9+\-*/.()]/g, '');
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return expr;
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleVoiceCommand = async (text: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    const cleanedText = text.trim();
src/App.tsx:    if (!cleanedText) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // First try local rapid parser
src/App.tsx:    const localExpr = convertBanglaSpokenToMathExpression(cleanedText);
src/App.tsx:    if (localExpr && localExpr.length > 0 && /[0-9]/.test(localExpr)) {
src/App.tsx:      setDisplay(prev => {
src/App.tsx:        let current = (prev === '0' || prev === 'Error') ? '' : prev;
src/App.tsx:        const lastChar = current.slice(-1);
src/App.tsx:        const firstChar = localExpr[0];
src/App.tsx:        const isLastOp = ['+', '-', '*', '/'].includes(lastChar);
src/App.tsx:        const isFirstOp = ['+', '-', '*', '/'].includes(firstChar);
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        if (isLastOp && isFirstOp) {
src/App.tsx:           return current.slice(0, -1) + localExpr;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        const isLastDigit = /[0-9]/.test(lastChar);
src/App.tsx:        const isFirstDigit = /[0-9]/.test(firstChar);
src/App.tsx:        if (isLastDigit && isFirstDigit && current.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:           return current + '+' + localExpr;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        return current + localExpr;
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // AI Fallback
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      setIsAiThinking(true);
src/App.tsx:      const expression = await parseMathVoiceCommandAI(cleanedText);
src/App.tsx:      if (!expression || expression === "ERROR") return;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      setDisplay(prev => {
src/App.tsx:          let current = (prev === '0' || prev === 'Error') ? '' : prev;
src/App.tsx:          const lastChar = current.slice(-1);
src/App.tsx:          const firstChar = expression[0];
src/App.tsx:          
src/App.tsx:          const isLastOp = ['+', '-', '*', '/'].includes(lastChar);
src/App.tsx:          const isFirstOp = ['+', '-', '*', '/'].includes(firstChar);
src/App.tsx:          
src/App.tsx:          if (isLastOp && isFirstOp) {
src/App.tsx:             return current.slice(0, -1) + expression;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:          const isLastDigit = /[0-9]/.test(lastChar);
src/App.tsx:          const isFirstDigit = /[0-9]/.test(firstChar);
src/App.tsx:          
src/App.tsx:          if (isLastDigit && isFirstDigit && current.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:             return current + '+' + expression;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:          
src/App.tsx:          return current + expression;
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsAiThinking(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:function BarcodePage({ products, settings }: { products: Product[], settings: ShopSettings }) {

src/App.tsx:  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<'generate' | 'history' | 'qr'>('generate');
src/App.tsx:  const [warning, setWarning] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [generatedValue, setGeneratedValue] = useState<string>('');

src/App.tsx:  const navigateTo = (view: 'generate' | 'history' | 'qr') => {
src/App.tsx:    setActiveView(view);
src/App.tsx:    setWarning(null);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleGenerateAndSave = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    setWarning(null);
src/App.tsx:    if (!selectedProduct) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (selectedProduct.barcode) {
src/App.tsx:      setWarning("This product already has a barcode.");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const digits = Array.from({ length: 12 }, () => Math.floor(Math.random() * 10));
src/App.tsx:    let sum = 0;
src/App.tsx:    for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
src/App.tsx:      sum += digits[i] * (i % 2 === 0 ? 1 : 3);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    const checkDigit = (10 - (sum % 10)) % 10;
src/App.tsx:    const randomValue = [...digits, checkDigit].join('');
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'products', selectedProduct.id), {
src/App.tsx:        barcode: randomValue
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      setGeneratedValue(randomValue);
src/App.tsx:      setWarning(null);
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.UPDATE, 'products');
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handlePrint = (value: string, type: 'barcode' | 'qr', quantity: number = 1) => {
src/App.tsx:    const printWindow = window.open('', '_blank', 'width=800,height=600');
src/App.tsx:    if (!printWindow) return;

src/App.tsx:    } else {

src/App.tsx:         contents += `<div class="content-wrapper"><canvas id="qr-${i}"></canvas></div>`;

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    printWindow.document.write(`
src/App.tsx:      <html lang="en">
src/App.tsx:        <head>
src/App.tsx:          <title>Print Label</title>
src/App.tsx:          <style>
src/App.tsx:            @media print {
src/App.tsx:              @page { size: 50mm 25mm; margin: 0; }
src/App.tsx:              body { margin: 0; padding: 0; width: 50mm; height: 25mm; }
src/App.tsx:              .content-wrapper { page-break-after: always; }
src/App.tsx:            }

src/App.tsx:                if (typeof JsBarcode !== 'undefined' && typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {

src/App.tsx:                }

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:            function runGeneration() {
src/App.tsx:                try {
src/App.tsx:                ${type === 'barcode' ? 
src/App.tsx:                  `for(let i=0; i<${quantity}; i++) { 
src/App.tsx:                    try {
src/App.tsx:                      let val = "${value}".replace(/\\D/g, '');
src/App.tsx:                      if (val.length === 0) val = "123456789012";
src/App.tsx:                      
src/App.tsx:                      if (val.length > 12) {
src/App.tsx:                          val = val.substring(0, 12);
src/App.tsx:                      } else if (val.length < 12) {
src/App.tsx:                          val = val.padStart(12, '0');
src/App.tsx:                      }
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:function WarrantyPage({ products, settings }: { products: Product[], settings: ShopSettings }) {
src/App.tsx:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const theme = PAGE_THEMES.warranty;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const warrantyProducts = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const base = products.filter(p => !!p.warranty);
src/App.tsx:    if (base.length === 0 && products.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:      return products.slice(0, 5).map((p, idx) => ({
src/App.tsx:        ...p,
src/App.tsx:        warranty: idx % 2 === 0 ? '1 Year Replacement' : '6 Months Service'
src/App.tsx:      }));
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    return base;
src/App.tsx:  }, [products]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filtered = warrantyProducts.filter(p => 
src/App.tsx:    p.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
src/App.tsx:    (p.barcode && p.barcode.includes(searchTerm))
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <motion.div 
src/App.tsx:      initial={{ opacity: 0 }} 
src/App.tsx:      animate={{ opacity: 1 }} 
src/App.tsx:      className="space-y-8 pb-20"
src/App.tsx:    >
src/App.tsx:      <motion.header

src/App.tsx:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const deferredSearchTerm = useDeferredValue(searchTerm);
src/App.tsx:  const [categoryFilter, setCategoryFilter] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'grid' | 'list'>('grid');

src/App.tsx:  const systemLang = settings.systemLanguage || 'bn';
src/App.tsx:  const st = (key: keyof typeof SYSTEM_TRANSLATIONS['en']) => (SYSTEM_TRANSLATIONS[systemLang] as any)[key] || (SYSTEM_TRANSLATIONS['en'] as any)[key];
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filteredProducts = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const term = deferredSearchTerm.trim().toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:    if (!term && !categoryFilter) return products;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    return products.filter(p => {
src/App.tsx:       if (categoryFilter !== '' && p.category !== categoryFilter) return false;
src/App.tsx:       if (!term) return true;
src/App.tsx:       
src/App.tsx:       const name = p.name.toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:       const barcode = (p.barcode || '').toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:       
src/App.tsx:       if (name.includes(term) || barcode.includes(term)) return true;
src/App.tsx:       if (isPhoneticMatch(p.name, term)) return true;
src/App.tsx:       
src/App.tsx:       return false;
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:  }, [products, deferredSearchTerm, categoryFilter]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleVoiceCommand = async (rawText: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    setSearchTerm('');
src/App.tsx:    setNotification({ type: 'info', message: 'Processing voice command...' });
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const aiResult = await parsePosVoiceCommandAI(
src/App.tsx:        rawText,
src/App.tsx:        products.map(p => ({ id: p.id!, name: p.name })),
src/App.tsx:        customers.map(c => ({ id: c.id!, name: c.name, phone: c.phone }))
src/App.tsx:      );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (aiResult && aiResult.items && aiResult.items.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:        let addedCount = 0;
src/App.tsx:        let missingItems: string[] = [];
src/App.tsx:        let customerSet = false;
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        for (const item of aiResult.items) {
src/App.tsx:          if (item.action === 'addProduct' || item.action === 'newProduct') {
src/App.tsx:            let match = null;
src/App.tsx:            if (item.productId) {
src/App.tsx:              match = products.find(p => p.id === item.productId);
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:            
src/App.tsx:            if (!match && item.recognizedName) {
src/App.tsx:              const nameLower = item.recognizedName.toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:              match = products.find(p => 
src/App.tsx:                p.name.toLowerCase().includes(nameLower) || 
src/App.tsx:                isPhoneticMatch(p.name, nameLower)
src/App.tsx:              );
src/App.tsx:              
src/App.tsx:              if (!match && nameLower.length > 2) {
src/App.tsx:                const words = nameLower.split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 2);
src/App.tsx:                match = products.find(p => 
src/App.tsx:                  words.some(w => p.name.toLowerCase().includes(w) || isPhoneticMatch(p.name, w))
src/App.tsx:                );
src/App.tsx:              }
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:            if (match) {
src/App.tsx:              addToCart(match, item.quantity > 0 ? item.quantity : 1);
src/App.tsx:              addedCount++;
src/App.tsx:            } else {
src/App.tsx:              missingItems.push(item.recognizedName || 'Unknown');
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:          } else if (item.action === 'setCustomer') {
src/App.tsx:            let cMatch = null;
src/App.tsx:            if (item.customerId) {
src/App.tsx:              cMatch = customers.find(c => c.id === item.customerId);
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:            if (!cMatch && item.recognizedName) {
src/App.tsx:              const cName = item.recognizedName.toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:              cMatch = customers.find(c => 
src/App.tsx:                c.name.toLowerCase().includes(cName) || 
src/App.tsx:                isPhoneticMatch(c.name, cName) ||
src/App.tsx:                (c.phone && c.phone.includes(cName))
src/App.tsx:              );
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:            if (cMatch) {
src/App.tsx:              setCheckoutData(prev => ({ ...prev, customerId: cMatch.id }));
src/App.tsx:              customerSet = true;
src/App.tsx:            } else {
src/App.tsx:              missingItems.push(item.recognizedName || 'Customer');
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        if (addedCount > 0) {
src/App.tsx:          setNotification({ 
src/App.tsx:            type: 'success', 
src/App.tsx:            message: `${aiResult.summary || `Added ${addedCount} items.`} ${missingItems.length > 0 ? `(Unrecognized: ${missingItems.join(', ')})` : ''}` 
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        } else if (customerSet && missingItems.length === 0) {
src/App.tsx:          setNotification({ type: 'success', message: aiResult.summary || 'Customer set successfully.' });
src/App.tsx:        } else if (missingItems.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:          setSearchTerm(missingItems[0]);
src/App.tsx:          setNotification({ 
src/App.tsx:            type: 'warning', 
src/App.tsx:            message: `Could not exactly match: ${missingItems.join(', ')}. Searching instead.` 
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:            setSearchTerm(rawText.trim());
src/App.tsx:            setNotification({ type: 'warning', message: 'No clear command identified. Searching instead.' });
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        setSearchTerm(rawText.trim());
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:      console.warn("AI parsing failed:", err);
src/App.tsx:      setSearchTerm(rawText.trim());
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const voiceLang = settings.systemLanguage === 'ar' ? 'ar-SA' : 'bn-BD';
src/App.tsx:  const { isListening, voiceFeedback, toggleVoiceSearch } = useVoiceSearch(handleVoiceCommand, (err) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (err === 'not-allowed') {
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: "Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone in browser settings.", type: 'error' });
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: `Voice search error: ${err}`, type: 'error' });
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }, voiceLang);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (e.key === 'Enter' && searchTerm.trim()) {
src/App.tsx:      e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const term = searchTerm.trim();
src/App.tsx:      // 1. Exact Barcode Match
src/App.tsx:      let match = products.find(p => p.barcode && p.barcode === term);
src/App.tsx:      let qty = 1;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (!match) {
src/App.tsx:        // 2. Try parsing as a command (e.g. "5 kg sugar")
src/App.tsx:        const parsed = parseVoiceCommandQuantity(term);
src/App.tsx:        qty = parsed.quantity;
src/App.tsx:        const sName = parsed.searchName.toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        // Find best match for sName
src/App.tsx:        match = products.find(p => 
src/App.tsx:          p.name.toLowerCase() === sName || 
src/App.tsx:          isPhoneticMatch(p.name, sName) ||
src/App.tsx:          (p.barcode && p.barcode === sName)
src/App.tsx:        );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        if (!match && filteredProducts.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:          match = filteredProducts[0];
src/App.tsx:          // If we found a match via filteredProducts, we might want to still use the parsed quantity
src/App.tsx:          // if the search term contained a quantity.
src/App.tsx:          if (parsed.matchFound) {
src/App.tsx:            qty = parsed.quantity;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (match) {
src/App.tsx:        addToCart(match, qty);
src/App.tsx:        setNotification({ type: 'success', message: `${qty > 1 ? qty + ' ' : ''}Added "${match.name}" to cart.` });
src/App.tsx:        setSearchTerm('');
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        setNotification({ type: 'error', message: `No product found for "${term}"` });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <motion.div 
src/App.tsx:      initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
src/App.tsx:      animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:      exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }}
src/App.tsx:      className="h-[calc(100vh-2.5rem)] lg:h-[calc(100vh-5rem)] flex flex-col gap-3 md:gap-4 p-2 md:p-0"
src/App.tsx:    >
src/App.tsx:      <header className="flex flex-col xl:flex-row xl:items-center justify-between gap-2.5 bg-white p-3 md:p-4 rounded-[1.5rem] md:rounded-[2rem] shadow-sm border border-gray-100 relative shrink-0">

src/App.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 shrink-0">

src/App.tsx:            <ShoppingCart className="w-4 h-4" />
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:          <div>

src/App.tsx:          <div className="flex flex-wrap sm:flex-nowrap items-center gap-2 bg-white p-1 rounded-2xl border-2 border-gray-100 shadow-sm transition-all hover:border-emerald-200 min-w-0 lg:max-w-[420px] group/customer">

src/App.tsx:                {!checkoutData.customerId ? (
src/App.tsx:                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg ring-1 ring-gray-200 transition-all group-focus-within/customer:bg-emerald-50 group-focus-within/customer:ring-emerald-200">
src/App.tsx:                    <User className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-gray-400 group-focus-within/customer:text-emerald-500" />
src/App.tsx:                    <span className="text-[9px] font-black text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider group-focus-within/customer:text-emerald-700">Walk-in</span>

src/App.tsx:    if (!file) return;
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    Papa.parse(file, {
src/App.tsx:      header: true,
src/App.tsx:      skipEmptyLines: true,
src/App.tsx:      complete: async (results: any) => {
src/App.tsx:        let report = {
src/App.tsx:          total: results.data.length,
src/App.tsx:          added: 0,
src/App.tsx:          updated: 0,
src/App.tsx:          duplicates: 0,
src/App.tsx:          totalStock: 0,
src/App.tsx:          errors: [] as string[],

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          setUploadProgress({ status: 'Processing...', current: 0, total: data.length });
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:            if (!name) {
src/App.tsx:              report.errors.push("Missing name in a row");
src/App.tsx:              continue;
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:            if (nameSetInCSV.has(name.toLowerCase())) {
src/App.tsx:              report.duplicates++;
src/App.tsx:            } else {
src/App.tsx:              nameSetInCSV.add(name.toLowerCase());
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:            const stockChange = Number(row.Stock || row.stock || row['Initial Stock'] || row['স্টক'] || 0);
src/App.tsx:            const existingProduct = productMap.get(name.toLowerCase());
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:            if (existingProduct) {
src/App.tsx:              // Update
src/App.tsx:              const newStock = existingProduct.stock + stockChange;
src/App.tsx:              batch.update(doc(db, 'products', existingProduct.id), {
src/App.tsx:                stock: newStock
src/App.tsx:              });
src/App.tsx:              report.updated++;
src/App.tsx:            } else {
src/App.tsx:              // Add
src/App.tsx:              const newProductRef = doc(collection(db, 'products'));
src/App.tsx:              const productData = {
src/App.tsx:                name,
src/App.tsx:                category: (row.Category || row.category || row['Catalog'] || row['Catalogue'] || row['বিভাগ'] || 'General').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                price: Number(row.Price || row.price || row['Selling Price'] || row['বিক্রয় মূল্য'] || 0),
src/App.tsx:                cost: Number(row.Cost || row.cost || row['Buying Price'] || row['ক্রয় মূল্য'] || 0),
src/App.tsx:                stock: stockChange,
src/App.tsx:                unit: (() => {
src/App.tsx:                  const rawUnit = (row.Unit || row.unit || row['একক'] || 'unit').toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:                  if (rawUnit.includes('kg')) return 'kg';
src/App.tsx:                  if (rawUnit.includes('doz')) return 'dozen';
src/App.tsx:                  if (rawUnit.includes('hal')) return 'hali';
src/App.tsx:                  return 'unit';
src/App.tsx:                })(),
src/App.tsx:                barcode: (row.Barcode || row.barcode || row['বারকোড'] || '').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                expiryDate: (row['Expiry Date'] || row.expiryDate || row['মেয়াদ'] || '').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                location: (row.Location || row.location || row['স্থান'] || '').trim(),

src/App.tsx:                department: (row.Department || row.department || '').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                warehouse: (row.Warehouse || row.warehouse || '').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                serialNumber: products.length + report.added + 1,
src/App.tsx:              };
src/App.tsx:              batch.set(newProductRef, productData);
src/App.tsx:              productMap.set(name.toLowerCase(), { id: newProductRef.id, ...productData } as Product);
src/App.tsx:              report.added++;
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:            batchCount++;
src/App.tsx:            if (batchCount === 500) {
src/App.tsx:              await batch.commit();
src/App.tsx:              batchCount = 0;
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          if (batchCount > 0) {
src/App.tsx:            await batch.commit();
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          // Calculate final total stock
src/App.tsx:          report.totalStock = finalProductsSnapshot.docs.reduce((acc, doc) => acc + (doc.data().stock || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:          
src/App.tsx:          setImportReport({ ...report, total: report.added + report.updated } as any);
src/App.tsx:        } catch (error) {

src/App.tsx:          setNotification({ message: 'Error during bulk import', type: 'error' });
src/App.tsx:        } finally {

src/App.tsx:  const getAiCategorySuggestion = async (productName: string) => {

src/App.tsx:        model: "gemini-flash-latest",
src/App.tsx:        contents: `Product Name: "${productName}"
src/App.tsx:List of available categories: ${FIXED_CATEGORIES.join(', ')}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:Task: Identify the most suitable category from the list above for this product name. The name might be in Bengali or English.

src/App.tsx:  const handleVoiceCommand = async (rawText: string) => {

src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const aiResult = await parsePosVoiceCommandAI(
src/App.tsx:        rawText,
src/App.tsx:        products.map(p => ({ id: p.id!, name: p.name })),
src/App.tsx:        []
src/App.tsx:      );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (aiResult && aiResult.items && aiResult.items.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:        const item = aiResult.items[0]; // For inventory, we only process the first action
src/App.tsx:        if (item.action === 'newProduct') {
src/App.tsx:           setIsModalOpen(true);
src/App.tsx:           setEditingProduct({
src/App.tsx:             name: item.productId ? (products.find(p => p.id === item.productId)?.name || rawText) : rawText.replace(/(নতুন|new|প্রোডাক্ট|product|অ্যাড|add|করো|কর|do)/gi, '').trim(),
src/App.tsx:             price: 0,
src/App.tsx:             stock: item.quantity || 0,
src/App.tsx:             unit: 'unit',
src/App.tsx:             cost: 0,
src/App.tsx:             barcode: '',
src/App.tsx:             category: 'General',
src/App.tsx:             department: '',
src/App.tsx:             location: '',
src/App.tsx:             expiryDate: ''
src/App.tsx:           });
src/App.tsx:           setNotification({ type: 'success', message: aiResult.summary || 'Opened Add Product Modal' });
src/App.tsx:           return;
src/App.tsx:        } else if (item.action === 'addProduct' && item.productId) {

src/App.tsx:           if (match) {

src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:      if (lower.includes('নতুন প্রোডাক্ট') || lower.includes('নতুন ইনভেন্টরি') || lower.includes('new product') || lower.includes('প্রোডাক্ট অ্যাড') || lower.includes('নতুন ফোডাক্ট')) {

src/App.tsx:         setNotification({ type: 'success', message: 'Voice: Opened Add Product Modal' });
src/App.tsx:         return;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      setSearchTerm(searchName.trim());
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ type: 'info', message: `Voice searched for: ${searchName.trim()}` });
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:    } catch (e: any) {

src/App.tsx:      if (e.message === 'QUOTA_EXCEEDED') {
src/App.tsx:        setNotification({ type: 'error', message: 'AI Voice Quota Exceeded. Using local search.' });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      setSearchTerm(rawText.trim());

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const salesCount: Record<string, number> = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const counts: Record<string, number> = {};
src/App.tsx:    sales.forEach(sale => {
src/App.tsx:      sale.items.forEach(item => {
src/App.tsx:        counts[item.productId] = (counts[item.productId] || 0) + (item.quantity || 1);
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    return counts;
src/App.tsx:  }, [sales]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const lastSaleDate: Record<string, number> = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const dates: Record<string, number> = {};
src/App.tsx:    sales.forEach(sale => {
src/App.tsx:      const saleTime = sale.timestamp ? (sale.timestamp as any).toMillis?.() || new Date(sale.timestamp).getTime() || 0 : 0;
src/App.tsx:      sale.items.forEach(item => {
src/App.tsx:        if (saleTime > (dates[item.productId] || 0)) {
src/App.tsx:          dates[item.productId] = saleTime;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    return dates;
src/App.tsx:  }, [sales]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const now = new Date();
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const sortedProducts = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const term = deferredSearchTerm.trim().toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const filtered = (term || categorySearch || productSortBy === 'expired_filter') 
src/App.tsx:      ? products.filter(p => {
src/App.tsx:          // Priority 1: Exact matches or barcode (fast)
src/App.tsx:          const name = p.name.toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:          const cat = p.category.toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:          const comp = (p.company || '').toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:          const barcode = (p.barcode || '').toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:          const serial = (p.serialNumber || '').toString();
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          if (name.includes(term) || barcode.includes(term) || serial.includes(term)) return true;
src/App.tsx:          if (cat.includes(term) || comp.includes(term)) return true;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          // Priority 2: Phonetic matches (heavier)
src/App.tsx:          if (isPhoneticMatch(p.name, term)) return true;
src/App.tsx:          if (isPhoneticMatch(p.category, term)) return true;
src/App.tsx:          if (p.company && isPhoneticMatch(p.company, term)) return true;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          return false;
src/App.tsx:        }).filter(p => {
src/App.tsx:          if (productSortBy === 'expired_filter') {
src/App.tsx:            if (!p.expiryDate) return false;
src/App.tsx:            return new Date(p.expiryDate) < now;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:          return true;
src/App.tsx:        })
src/App.tsx:      : products;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return [...filtered].sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:      let cmp = 0;
src/App.tsx:      switch (productSortBy) {
src/App.tsx:        case 'serial':
src/App.tsx:          cmp = (a.serialNumber || 0) - (b.serialNumber || 0);
src/App.tsx:          break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'company':
src/App.tsx:          cmp = (a.company || '').localeCompare(b.company || '');
src/App.tsx:          break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'near_expire':
src/App.tsx:          const aDate = a.expiryDate ? new Date(a.expiryDate).getTime() : Infinity;
src/App.tsx:          const bDate = b.expiryDate ? new Date(b.expiryDate).getTime() : Infinity;
src/App.tsx:          cmp = aDate - bDate;
src/App.tsx:          break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'price':
src/App.tsx:        case 'low_price':
src/App.tsx:        case 'high_price':
src/App.tsx:          cmp = a.price - b.price;
src/App.tsx:          break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'stock':
src/App.tsx:          cmp = a.stock - b.stock;
src/App.tsx:          break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'long_time_no_sell':
src/App.tsx:          cmp = (lastSaleDate[a.id] || 0) - (lastSaleDate[b.id] || 0);
src/App.tsx:          break;
src/App.tsx:        case 'trending':
src/App.tsx:          cmp = (salesCount[a.id] || 0) - (salesCount[b.id] || 0);
src/App.tsx:          break;
src/App.tsx:        default:
src/App.tsx:          cmp = a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      return productSortOrder === 'asc' ? cmp : -cmp;
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:  }, [products, deferredSearchTerm, categorySearch, productSortBy, productSortOrder, now, lastSaleDate, salesCount]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    setCurrentPage(1);
src/App.tsx:  }, [deferredSearchTerm, categorySearch, productSortBy, productSortOrder]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(sortedProducts.length / itemsPerPage));
src/App.tsx:  const validCurrentPage = Math.min(currentPage, totalPages);
src/App.tsx:  const paginatedProducts = sortedProducts.slice((validCurrentPage - 1) * itemsPerPage, validCurrentPage * itemsPerPage);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

src/App.tsx:      setProductImage(null);

src/App.tsx:  const handleDownloadCSV = () => {

src/App.tsx:      'Serial Number': p.serialNumber,

src/App.tsx:  const handleUploadCSV = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
src/App.tsx:    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
src/App.tsx:    if (file) {
src/App.tsx:      if (!window.confirm("Are you sure? This will DELETE all existing inventory and replace it with this file's content.\n\nআপনি কি নিশ্চিত? এটি আপনার বর্তমান সমস্ত ইনভেন্টরি মুছে ফেলবে এবং এই ফাইল থেকে নতুন ডাটা যোগ করবে।")) {
src/App.tsx:        if (e.target) e.target.value = '';
src/App.tsx:        return;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      setIsUploading(true);
src/App.tsx:      setImportReport(null);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      Papa.parse(file, {
src/App.tsx:        header: true,
src/App.tsx:        skipEmptyLines: true,
src/App.tsx:        complete: async (results: any) => {
src/App.tsx:          let report = {
src/App.tsx:            total: results.data.length,
src/App.tsx:            success: 0,
src/App.tsx:            failed: 0,
src/App.tsx:            errors: [] as string[],
src/App.tsx:            show: true
src/App.tsx:          };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          try {
src/App.tsx:            const data = results.data;
src/App.tsx:            
src/App.tsx:            // Fetch fresh list of IDs to ensure everything is deleted
src/App.tsx:            setUploadProgress({ status: 'Querying current inventory...', current: 0, total: 0 });
src/App.tsx:            const productIds = querySnapshot.docs.map(doc => doc.id);
src/App.tsx:            
src/App.tsx:            setUploadProgress({ status: 'Deleting current inventory...', current: 0, total: productIds.length });
src/App.tsx:            
src/App.tsx:            for (let i = 0; i < productIds.length; i += 500) {
src/App.tsx:              const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/App.tsx:              const chunk = productIds.slice(i, i + 500);
src/App.tsx:              chunk.forEach(id => {
src/App.tsx:                batch.delete(doc(db, 'products', id));
src/App.tsx:              });
src/App.tsx:              await batch.commit();
src/App.tsx:              setUploadProgress(prev => prev ? { ...prev, current: i + chunk.length } : null);
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:            
src/App.tsx:            // Add new products in batches
src/App.tsx:            setUploadProgress({ status: 'Uploading new products...', current: 0, total: data.length });
src/App.tsx:            for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i += 500) {
src/App.tsx:              const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/App.tsx:              const chunk = data.slice(i, i + 500);
src/App.tsx:              
src/App.tsx:              chunk.forEach((row: any) => {
src/App.tsx:                try {
src/App.tsx:                  const name = (row.Name || row.name || row['Product Name'] || row['পণ্যের নাম'] || '').trim();
src/App.tsx:                  const price = Number(row.Price || row.price || row['Selling Price'] || row['বিক্রয় মূল্য'] || 0);
src/App.tsx:                  const serialFromCSV = Number(row['Serial Number'] || row.serialNumber || row['সিরিয়াল'] || NaN);
src/App.tsx:                  
src/App.tsx:                  if (!name) {
src/App.tsx:                    report.failed++;
src/App.tsx:                    report.errors.push("Missing name in row " + (report.success + report.failed + 1));
src/App.tsx:                    return;
src/App.tsx:                  }
src/App.tsx:                  
src/App.tsx:                  const productData = {
src/App.tsx:                    name,
src/App.tsx:                    category: (row.Category || row.category || row['Catalog'] || row['Catalogue'] || row['বিভাগ'] || 'General').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                    price: isNaN(price) ? 0 : price,
src/App.tsx:                    cost: Number(row.Cost || row.cost || row['Buying Price'] || row['ক্রয় মূল্য'] || 0),
src/App.tsx:                    stock: Number(row.Stock || row.stock || row['Initial Stock'] || row['স্টক'] || 0),
src/App.tsx:                    unit: (row.Unit || row.unit || row['একক'] || 'unit').toLowerCase().includes('kg') ? 'kg' : 'unit',
src/App.tsx:                    barcode: (row.Barcode || row.barcode || row['বারকোড'] || '').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                    expiryDate: (row['Expiry Date'] || row.expiryDate || row['মেয়াদ'] || '').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                    location: (row.Location || row.location || row['স্থান'] || '').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                    company: (row.Company || row.company || row['Company Name'] || row['কোম্পানি'] || '').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                    department: (row.Department || row.department || '').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                    warehouse: (row.Warehouse || row.warehouse || '').trim(),
src/App.tsx:                    serialNumber: !isNaN(serialFromCSV) ? serialFromCSV : (report.success + 1),
src/App.tsx:                  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:                  const newDocRef = doc(collection(db, 'products'));
src/App.tsx:                  batch.set(newDocRef, productData);
src/App.tsx:                  report.success++;
src/App.tsx:                } catch (rowError: any) {
src/App.tsx:                  report.failed++;
src/App.tsx:                  report.errors.push(`Row Error: ${rowError.message || 'Unknown error'}`);
src/App.tsx:                }
src/App.tsx:              });
src/App.tsx:              
src/App.tsx:              await batch.commit();
src/App.tsx:              setUploadProgress(prev => prev ? { ...prev, current: i + chunk.length } : null);
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:            
src/App.tsx:            setImportReport(report);
src/App.tsx:            setNotification({ type: 'success', message: `Import completed: ${report.success} success, ${report.failed} failed.` });
src/App.tsx:          } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:            console.error("CSV Import Error:", error);
src/App.tsx:            setNotification({ type: 'error', message: 'Critical failure during inventory reset.' });
src/App.tsx:            setImportReport(prev => prev ? { ...prev, show: true } : report);
src/App.tsx:          } finally {
src/App.tsx:            setIsUploading(false);
src/App.tsx:            setUploadProgress(null);
src/App.tsx:            if (e.target) e.target.value = '';
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        },
src/App.tsx:        error: (error) => {
src/App.tsx:           console.error("Papa Parse Error:", error);
src/App.tsx:           setNotification({ type: 'error', message: 'Failed to parse CSV file.' });
src/App.tsx:           setIsUploading(false);
src/App.tsx:           setUploadProgress(null);
src/App.tsx:           if (e.target) e.target.value = '';
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:    if (isSaving) return;
src/App.tsx:    setIsSaving(true);
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const form = e.target as HTMLFormElement;
src/App.tsx:    const formData = new FormData(form);
src/App.tsx:    const imageFile = (form.querySelector('input[type="file"]') as HTMLInputElement)?.files?.[0];
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    let finalImageUrl = productImage;
src/App.tsx:    if (imageFile) {
src/App.tsx:      finalImageUrl = await fileToBase64(imageFile);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const productData = {
src/App.tsx:      name: formData.get('name') as string,
src/App.tsx:      category: formData.get('category') as string,
src/App.tsx:      price: Number(formData.get('price')),
src/App.tsx:      cost: Number(formData.get('cost') || 0),
src/App.tsx:      stock: Number(formData.get('stock') || 0),
src/App.tsx:      unit: formData.get('unit') as string,
src/App.tsx:      barcode: formData.get('barcode') as string || '',
src/App.tsx:      department: formData.get('department') as string || '',
src/App.tsx:      warehouse: formData.get('warehouse') as string || '',
src/App.tsx:      expiryDate: formatToBnDate(formData.get('expiryDate') as string || ''),
src/App.tsx:      location: formData.get('location') as string || '',
src/App.tsx:      company: formData.get('company') as string || '',
src/App.tsx:      imageUrl: finalImageUrl
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (!productData.name || isNaN(productData.price) || productData.price < 0) {
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: "Please enter a valid product name and price.", type: 'error' });
src/App.tsx:      setIsSaving(false);
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      if (editingProduct?.id) {
src/App.tsx:        await updateDoc(doc(db, 'products', editingProduct.id), productData);
src/App.tsx:        setNotification({ message: "Product updated successfully!", type: 'success' });
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        // Generate serial number
src/App.tsx:        const maxSerial = products.reduce((max, p) => Math.max(max, p.serialNumber || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:        const newProduct = {
src/App.tsx:          ...productData,
src/App.tsx:          serialNumber: maxSerial + 1
src/App.tsx:        };
src/App.tsx:        await addDoc(collection(db, 'products'), newProduct);
src/App.tsx:        setNotification({ message: "Product added successfully!", type: 'success' });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      setIsModalOpen(false);
src/App.tsx:      setEditingProduct(null);
src/App.tsx:      setProductImage(null);
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.WRITE, 'products');
src/App.tsx:      setNotification({ message: "Failed to save product.", type: 'error' });
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsSaving(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleBulkAddStock = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {

src/App.tsx:function SalesHistory({ sales, customers, onEdit, onDelete, settings, isOnline }: { sales: Sale[], customers: Customer[], onEdit: (sale: Sale) => void, onDelete: (sale: Sale) => void, settings: ShopSettings, isOnline: boolean }) {
src/App.tsx:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedSale, setSelectedSale] = useState<Sale | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [confirmDeleteId, setConfirmDeleteId] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [isFilterPaneOpen, setIsFilterPaneOpen] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState<'all' | 'settled' | 'pending'>('all');
src/App.tsx:  const [paymentMethodFilter, setPaymentMethodFilter] = useState<'all' | 'cash' | 'bkash' | 'nagad' | 'card'>('all');
src/App.tsx:  const [segmentFilter, setSegmentFilter] = useState<'all' | 'vip' | 'regular'>('all');
src/App.tsx:  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [reportTab, setReportTab] = useState<'logs' | 'product_report' | 'customer_report'>('logs');
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleVoiceCommand = (text: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    setSearchTerm(text.trim());
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:  const voiceLang = settings.systemLanguage === 'ar' ? 'ar-SA' : 'bn-BD';
src/App.tsx:  const { isListening, voiceFeedback, toggleVoiceSearch } = useVoiceSearch(handleVoiceCommand, undefined, voiceLang);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filteredSales = sales.filter(sale => {
src/App.tsx:    // Search filter
src/App.tsx:    const matchesSearch = sale.id.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
src/App.tsx:      (sale.customerName && sale.customerName.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) ||
src/App.tsx:      (sale.customerPhone && sale.customerPhone.includes(searchTerm));
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    if (!matchesSearch) return false;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Status filter
src/App.tsx:    if (statusFilter === 'settled' && sale.dueAmount > 0) return false;
src/App.tsx:    if (statusFilter === 'pending' && sale.dueAmount <= 0) return false;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Date filter
src/App.tsx:    const saleDate = safeDate(sale.timestamp);
src/App.tsx:    if (startDate) {
src/App.tsx:      const start = new Date(startDate);
src/App.tsx:      start.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
src/App.tsx:      if (saleDate < start) return false;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (endDate) {
src/App.tsx:      const end = new Date(endDate);
src/App.tsx:      end.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
src/App.tsx:      if (saleDate > end) return false;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Payment Method filter
src/App.tsx:    if (paymentMethodFilter !== 'all' && sale.paymentMethod !== paymentMethodFilter) return false;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Segment filter
src/App.tsx:    if (segmentFilter !== 'all') {
src/App.tsx:      const customer = customers.find(c => c.id === sale.customerId);
src/App.tsx:      const isVip = customer && customer.totalSpent > 10000;
src/App.tsx:      if (segmentFilter === 'vip' && !isVip) return false;
src/App.tsx:      if (segmentFilter === 'regular' && isVip) return false;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return true;
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const getSalesByProduct = () => {
src/App.tsx:    const productSales: Record<string, { id: string, name: string, quantity: number, revenue: number }> = {};
src/App.tsx:    filteredSales.forEach(sale => {
src/App.tsx:      sale.items?.forEach(item => {
src/App.tsx:        const id = item.productId || item.name;
src/App.tsx:        if (!productSales[id]) {
src/App.tsx:            productSales[id] = { id, name: item.name, quantity: 0, revenue: 0 };
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        productSales[id].quantity += item.quantity;
src/App.tsx:        productSales[id].revenue += item.quantity * item.price; 
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    return Object.values(productSales).sort((a,b) => b.revenue - a.revenue);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const getSalesByCustomer = () => {
src/App.tsx:    const customerSales: Record<string, { id: string, name: string, phone: string, purchases: number, revenue: number, due: number }> = {};
src/App.tsx:    filteredSales.forEach(sale => {
src/App.tsx:      const id = sale.customerId || sale.customerName || 'Walk-in';
src/App.tsx:      if (!customerSales[id]) {
src/App.tsx:        customerSales[id] = { id, name: sale.customerName || 'Walk-in', phone: sale.customerPhone || '', purchases: 0, revenue: 0, due: 0 };
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      customerSales[id].purchases += 1;
src/App.tsx:      customerSales[id].revenue += sale.finalAmount;
src/App.tsx:      customerSales[id].due += sale.dueAmount;
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    return Object.values(customerSales).sort((a,b) => b.revenue - a.revenue);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleExportCSV = () => {
src/App.tsx:     let csvData: any[] = [];
src/App.tsx:     let filename = '';
src/App.tsx:     if (reportTab === 'logs') {
src/App.tsx:       csvData = filteredSales.map(s => ({
src/App.tsx:         'Date': safeDate(s.timestamp).toLocaleString(),
src/App.tsx:         'Invoice ID': s.id,
src/App.tsx:         'Customer Name': s.customerName || 'Walk-in',
src/App.tsx:         'Customer Phone': s.customerPhone || '',
src/App.tsx:         'Total Amount': s.finalAmount,
src/App.tsx:         'Paid Amount': s.paidAmount,
src/App.tsx:         'Due Amount': s.dueAmount,
src/App.tsx:         'Payment Method': s.paymentMethod || 'cash',
src/App.tsx:         'Items Count': s.items ? s.items.length : 0,
src/App.tsx:         'Status': s.dueAmount > 0 ? 'Pending' : 'Settled'
src/App.tsx:       }));
src/App.tsx:       filename = `sales_logs_${format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd')}.csv`;
src/App.tsx:     } else if (reportTab === 'product_report') {

src/App.tsx:         'Units Sold': p.quantity,
src/App.tsx:         'Total Revenue': p.revenue

src/App.tsx:     document.body.appendChild(link);
src/App.tsx:     link.click();
src/App.tsx:     document.body.removeChild(link);

src/App.tsx:                  </div>
src/App.tsx:                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm pt-4">
src/App.tsx:                    <span className="text-gray-500">Amount Paid</span>
src/App.tsx:                    <span className="text-emerald-600 font-bold">{formatCurrency(selectedSale.paidAmount)}</span>
src/App.tsx:                  </div>
src/App.tsx:                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
src/App.tsx:                    <span className="text-gray-500">Due Amount</span>
src/App.tsx:                    <span className="text-red-600 font-bold">{formatCurrency(selectedSale.dueAmount)}</span>
src/App.tsx:                  </div>
src/App.tsx:                </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:                <div className="flex gap-4 pt-4">
src/App.tsx:                  <button 
src/App.tsx:                    onClick={() => printInvoice(selectedSale, settings)}
src/App.tsx:                    className="flex-1 py-3 bg-indigo-600 text-white font-bold rounded-xl hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
src/App.tsx:                  >
src/App.tsx:                    <Printer className="w-5 h-5" />
src/App.tsx:                    Print
src/App.tsx:                  </button>
src/App.tsx:                  <button 
src/App.tsx:                    onClick={() => downloadInvoicePDF(selectedSale, settings)}
src/App.tsx:                    className="flex-1 py-3 bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 font-bold rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-200 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
src/App.tsx:                  >
src/App.tsx:                    <Download className="w-5 h-5" />
src/App.tsx:                    Download
src/App.tsx:                  </button>
src/App.tsx:                </div>
src/App.tsx:              </div>
src/App.tsx:            </motion.div>
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        )}
src/App.tsx:      </AnimatePresence>
src/App.tsx:    </motion.div>
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:function Accounting({ 
src/App.tsx:  sales, 
src/App.tsx:  products, 
src/App.tsx:  expenses, 
src/App.tsx:  investments, 
src/App.tsx:  staffSalaries, 
src/App.tsx:  customers,
src/App.tsx:  onAddExpense,
src/App.tsx:  onAddInvestment,
src/App.tsx:  onAddSalary,
src/App.tsx:  onDeleteExpense,
src/App.tsx:  onDeleteInvestment,
src/App.tsx:  onDeleteSalary,
src/App.tsx:  onSendWhatsAppReminder
src/App.tsx:}: { 
src/App.tsx:  sales: Sale[], 
src/App.tsx:  products: Product[], 
src/App.tsx:  expenses: Expense[], 
src/App.tsx:  investments: Investment[], 
src/App.tsx:  staffSalaries: StaffSalary[],
src/App.tsx:  customers: Customer[],
src/App.tsx:  onAddExpense: (e: Omit<Expense, 'id'>) => void,
src/App.tsx:  onAddInvestment: (i: Omit<Investment, 'id'>) => void,
src/App.tsx:  onAddSalary: (s: Omit<StaffSalary, 'id'>) => void,
src/App.tsx:  onDeleteExpense: (e: Expense) => void,
src/App.tsx:  onDeleteInvestment: (i: Investment) => void,
src/App.tsx:  onDeleteSalary: (s: StaffSalary) => void,
src/App.tsx:  onSendWhatsAppReminder: (customer: Customer, lang: 'en' | 'bn') => void
src/App.tsx:}) {
src/App.tsx:  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'overview' | 'expenses' | 'investments' | 'salaries' | 'dues'>('overview');
src/App.tsx:  const [isExpenseModalOpen, setIsExpenseModalOpen] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [isInvestmentModalOpen, setIsInvestmentModalOpen] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [isSalaryModalOpen, setIsSalaryModalOpen] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totalSales = useMemo(() => sales.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.finalAmount || 0), 0), [sales]);
src/App.tsx:  const totalCost = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    return sales.reduce((sum, s) => {
src/App.tsx:      return sum + s.items.reduce((itemSum, item) => {
src/App.tsx:        return itemSum + ((item.cost || 0) * item.quantity);
src/App.tsx:      }, 0);
src/App.tsx:    }, 0);
src/App.tsx:  }, [sales]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totalExpenses = useMemo(() => expenses.reduce((sum, e) => sum + (e.amount || 0), 0), [expenses]);
src/App.tsx:  const totalInvestments = useMemo(() => investments.reduce((sum, i) => sum + (i.amount || 0), 0), [investments]);
src/App.tsx:  const totalSalaries = useMemo(() => staffSalaries.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.amount || 0), 0), [staffSalaries]);
src/App.tsx:  const totalMarketDue = useMemo(() => customers.reduce((sum, c) => sum + (c.currentDue || 0), 0), [customers]);
src/App.tsx:  const netProfit = totalSales - totalCost - totalExpenses;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const highDueCustomers = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    return customers.filter(c => (c.currentDue || 0) >= 5000)
src/App.tsx:      .sort((a, b) => (b.currentDue || 0) - (a.currentDue || 0));
src/App.tsx:  }, [customers]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleExpenseSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:    const form = e.target as HTMLFormElement;
src/App.tsx:    const formData = new FormData(form);
src/App.tsx:    onAddExpense({
src/App.tsx:      category: formData.get('category') as any,
src/App.tsx:      amount: Number(formData.get('amount')),
src/App.tsx:      description: formData.get('description') as string,
src/App.tsx:      timestamp: new Date()
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    setIsExpenseModalOpen(false);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleInvestmentSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:    const form = e.target as HTMLFormElement;
src/App.tsx:    const formData = new FormData(form);
src/App.tsx:    onAddInvestment({
src/App.tsx:      amount: Number(formData.get('amount')),
src/App.tsx:      description: formData.get('description') as string,
src/App.tsx:      timestamp: new Date()
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    setIsInvestmentModalOpen(false);
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const allCustomers = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const pendingCustomers = syncQueue
src/App.tsx:      .filter(item => item.type === 'customer')
src/App.tsx:      .map(item => ({ 
src/App.tsx:        id: item.data.customId, 
src/App.tsx:        ...item.data.customerData, 
src/App.tsx:        isSyncing: true 
src/App.tsx:      }));
src/App.tsx:    return [...pendingCustomers, ...customers];
src/App.tsx:  }, [customers, syncQueue]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleVoiceCommand = (text: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    setSearchTerm(text.trim());
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:  const voiceLang = shopSettings.systemLanguage === 'ar' ? 'ar-SA' : 'bn-BD';
src/App.tsx:  const { isListening, voiceFeedback, toggleVoiceSearch } = useVoiceSearch(handleVoiceCommand, undefined, voiceLang);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filteredCustomers = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!searchTerm) return allCustomers;

src/App.tsx:  const handleCollectDue = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {

src/App.tsx:    if (!selectedCustomerForHistory) return;

src/App.tsx:        remainingDue: selectedCustomerForHistory.currentDue - amount,
src/App.tsx:        method,
src/App.tsx:        note,
src/App.tsx:      };

src/App.tsx:          paymentData,
src/App.tsx:          customerId: selectedCustomerForHistory.id,
src/App.tsx:          amount

src/App.tsx:        ...selectedCustomerForHistory,
src/App.tsx:        currentDue: selectedCustomerForHistory.currentDue - amount
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  sales: Sale[],

src/App.tsx:  const today = format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd');
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Find the last closing timestamp to define the current session
src/App.tsx:  const lastClosingDate = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!dailyClosings || dailyClosings.length === 0) return null;
src/App.tsx:    const sorted = [...dailyClosings].sort((a, b) => safeDate(b.timestamp).getTime() - safeDate(a.timestamp).getTime());
src/App.tsx:    return safeDate(sorted[0].timestamp).getTime();
src/App.tsx:  }, [dailyClosings]);
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  // Calculate stats for the current session (since last closing)
src/App.tsx:  // We filter by 'today' as well to keep the context of "Daily Closing"
src/App.tsx:  // Given it's called 'DailyClosing', keeping the today check is safer to avoid multi-day aggregation in a single report.
src/App.tsx:  const todaySales = sales.filter(s => {
src/App.tsx:    const ts = safeDate(s.timestamp);
src/App.tsx:    const tsTime = ts.getTime();
src/App.tsx:    const isSameDay = format(ts, 'yyyy-MM-dd') === today;
src/App.tsx:    const isAfterLastClosing = !lastClosingDate || tsTime > lastClosingDate;
src/App.tsx:    return isSameDay && isAfterLastClosing;
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const totalSales = todaySales.reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.finalAmount, 0);
src/App.tsx:  const cashSales = todaySales.filter(s => s.paymentMethod === 'cash').reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.paidAmount, 0);
src/App.tsx:  const dueSales = todaySales.reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.dueAmount, 0);
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const todayCollections = duePayments.filter(p => {
src/App.tsx:    const ts = safeDate(p.timestamp);
src/App.tsx:    const tsTime = ts.getTime();
src/App.tsx:    const isSameDay = format(ts, 'yyyy-MM-dd') === today;
src/App.tsx:    const isAfterLastClosing = !lastClosingDate || tsTime > lastClosingDate;
src/App.tsx:    return isSameDay && isAfterLastClosing;
src/App.tsx:  }).reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.amount, 0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const cashReceived = todaySales.reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.paidAmount, 0) + todayCollections;
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const todayExpenses = expenses.filter(e => {
src/App.tsx:    const ts = safeDate(e.timestamp);
src/App.tsx:    const tsTime = ts.getTime();
src/App.tsx:    const isSameDay = format(ts, 'yyyy-MM-dd') === today;
src/App.tsx:    const isAfterLastClosing = !lastClosingDate || tsTime > lastClosingDate;
src/App.tsx:    return isSameDay && isAfterLastClosing;
src/App.tsx:  }).reduce((sum, e) => sum + e.amount, 0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const [denominations, setDenominations] = useState<{ [key: string]: number }>({
src/App.tsx:    '1000': 0, '500': 0, '200': 0, '100': 0, '50': 0, '20': 0, '10': 0, '5': 0

test_scores.ts:
test_scores.ts:const calculateScore = (targetText: string, searchStr: string, phoneticSearch: string, sWords: string[]) => {
test_scores.ts:      let score = 0;
test_scores.ts:      const tName = standardizeBn(targetText);
test_scores.ts:      const phoneticTName = toPhonetic(tName);
test_scores.ts:      
test_scores.ts:      if (tName === searchStr) score += 100;
test_scores.ts:      if (phoneticTName === phoneticSearch && phoneticSearch.length > 2) score += 90;
test_scores.ts:      if (tName.includes(searchStr)) score += 50;
test_scores.ts:      if (phoneticTName.includes(phoneticSearch) && phoneticSearch.length > 3) score += 40;
test_scores.ts:      
test_scores.ts:      const wordsMatch = sWords.filter((w: string) => tName.includes(w)).length;
test_scores.ts:      score += wordsMatch * 10;
test_scores.ts:      
test_scores.ts:      const tWords = tName.split(/\s+/).filter((w: string) => w.length > 0);
test_scores.ts:      const phoneticWordsMatch = sWords.filter((w: string) => {
test_scores.ts:          const phW = toPhonetic(w);
test_scores.ts:          return phW.length > 0 && tWords.some((pw: string) => {
test_scores.ts:              const phT = toPhonetic(pw);
test_scores.ts:              return phT === phW || phT.includes(phW) || (phW.length > 2 && phW.includes(phT));
test_scores.ts:          });
test_scores.ts:      }).length;
test_scores.ts:      score += phoneticWordsMatch * 8;
test_scores.ts:      
test_scores.ts:      return score;
test_scores.ts:};

security_spec.md:# Firestore Security Specification
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:## Data Invariants
security_spec.md:1. All business entities (Sales, Products, Customers, etc.) MUST have a valid `shopId`.
security_spec.md:3. Merchants own their `shopId` (matching their UID).
security_spec.md:5. Master Admin (`stratproamz@gmail.com`) has bypass access to all shops.
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:## The Dirty Dozen Payloads
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:1. **Identity Spoofing**: Merchant A attempts to create a product with `shopId: "merchantB"`.
security_spec.md:2. **State Shortcutting**: Staff attempts to update sensitive settings without permission.
security_spec.md:3. **Resource Poisoning**: Attacker attempts to create a document with a 1MB string as building ID.
security_spec.md:5. **Orphaned Write**: Creating a sale without a valid `shopId`.
security_spec.md:6. **Immutable Field Tampering**: Updating `createdAt` or `originalOrderId`.
security_spec.md:7. **Privilege Escalation**: Staff member attempts to update their own role to 'admin'.
security_spec.md:8. **Value Poisoning**: Updating `price` to a negative number or a string.
security_spec.md:10. **Terminal State Break**: Updating a completed `daily_closing`.
security_spec.md:11. **PII Isolation**: Non-owner attempts to read full customer profile including private notes.
security_spec.md:12. **Denial of Wallet**: Creating 10,000 recursive subcollections (theoretical, rules should limit).
security_spec.md:
security_spec.md:## Test Runner (Logic Check)
security_spec.md:The rules must reject all the above.

HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:# Hostinger Deployment Guide for ShopMaster POS
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:Congratulations on your POS system! To make it live on **pos.sellerscampus.com** using Hostinger, follow these steps:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:## 1. Prepare your Repository
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:1. Push your code to a **GitHub repository** (Private or Public).
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:2. Ensure you have the `server.ts`, `package.json`, and `.env.example` files at the root.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:## 2. Hostinger Setup (Node.js App)
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:1. Log in to your **Hostinger hPanel**.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:2. Go to **Websites** -> **Manage** -> **Node.js**.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:3. Click **Create New Application** or **Import from GitHub**.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:4. **Application Setup**:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:   - **Entry File**: `server.ts`
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:   - **Framework**: Custom (Express)
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:   - **Port**: 3000
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:5. **Environment Variables**:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:   - Go to the **Environment Variables** tab in Hostinger.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:   - Add `NODE_ENV=production`
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:   - Add `GEMINI_API_KEY` (Your Google Gemini Key for Voice AI)
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:   - Add `PORT=3000`
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:## 3. Domain Configuration (pos.sellerscampus.com)
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:1. In Hostinger, go to **Domains** -> **Manage**.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:2. Add a **CNAME** record:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:   - **Name**: `pos`
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:   - **Points to**: Your Hostinger hosting server address (or use the Node.js domain mapping feature).
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:3. In the Node.js section, map your app to the domain **pos.sellerscampus.com**.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:## 4. Automatic Updates (CI/CD)
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:- When you connect Hostinger to GitHub, enable **"Auto Deploy"**.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:- Now, whenever you push changes to your GitHub `main` branch, Hostinger will automatically:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:  1. Pull the new code.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:  2. Run `npm install`.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:  3. Run `npm run build` (Client).
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:  4. Restart the server.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:## 5. Manual Build (If needed)
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:If you need to manually rebuild on the server:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:```bash
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:npm install
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:npm run build
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:npm start
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:```
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:## 6. Important Notes
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:- **Firebase**: Ensure your Firebase whitelist includes `pos.sellerscampus.com`. Go to Firebase Console -> Auth -> Settings -> Authorized domains.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:- **SSL**: Hostinger provides free SSL. Ensure it is active for your subdomain.
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:
HOSTINGER_SETUP.md:Your app is now ready for production!

server.js:import express from 'express';

server.js:import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';
server.js:import fs from 'fs';
server.js:
server.js:const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
server.js:const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
server.js:
server.js:async function startServer() {
server.js:  const app = express();
server.js:  const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
server.js:  
server.js:  const isProd = process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production';
server.js:
server.js:  // For development (AI Studio / Local dev)
server.js:  if (!isProd) {
server.js:    const { createServer: createViteServer } = await import('vite');
server.js:    const vite = await createViteServer({
server.js:      server: { middlewareMode: true },

dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const generatorFunction = (code, details = {}) => {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      const message = messages[code];
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      if (!message) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        throw new Error(`Unable to find message for code '${code}'.`);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      return message(details);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    };
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const messageGenerator = generatorFunction;

dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * Workbox errors should be thrown with this class.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * This allows use to ensure the type easily in tests,
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * helps developers identify errors from workbox
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * easily and allows use to optimise error
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * messages correctly.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     *
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * @private
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    class WorkboxError extends Error {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      /**
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       *
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * @param {string} errorCode The error code that
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * identifies this particular error.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * @param {Object=} details Any relevant arguments
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * that will help developers identify issues should
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * be added as a key on the context object.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      constructor(errorCode, details) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        const message = messageGenerator(errorCode, details);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        super(message);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        this.name = errorCode;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        this.details = details;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    /*
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      Copyright 2018 Google LLC

dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      Use of this source code is governed by an MIT-style

dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    /*
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * This method throws if the supplied value is not an array.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * The destructed and restructured object is so it's clear what is
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * needed.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const isArray = (value, details) => {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      if (!Array.isArray(value)) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        throw new WorkboxError('not-an-array', details);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    };
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const hasMethod = (object, expectedMethod, details) => {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      const type = typeof object[expectedMethod];
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      if (type !== 'function') {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        details['expectedMethod'] = expectedMethod;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        throw new WorkboxError('missing-a-method', details);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    };
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const isType = (object, expectedType, details) => {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      if (typeof object !== expectedType) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        details['expectedType'] = expectedType;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        throw new WorkboxError('incorrect-type', details);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    };
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const isInstance = (object,
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    // Need the general type to do the check later.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/ban-types
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    expectedClass, details) => {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      if (!(object instanceof expectedClass)) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        details['expectedClassName'] = expectedClass.name;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        throw new WorkboxError('incorrect-class', details);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    };
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const isOneOf = (value, validValues, details) => {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      if (!validValues.includes(value)) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        details['validValueDescription'] = `Valid values are ${JSON.stringify(validValues)}.`;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        throw new WorkboxError('invalid-value', details);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    };
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const isArrayOfClass = (value,
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    // Need general type to do check later.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    expectedClass,
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    // eslint-disable-line
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    details) => {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      const error = new WorkboxError('not-array-of-class', details);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      if (!Array.isArray(value)) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        throw error;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      for (const item of value) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        if (!(item instanceof expectedClass)) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          throw error;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    };

dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      hasMethod,
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      isArray,
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      isInstance,
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      isOneOf,
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      isType,
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      isArrayOfClass

dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const defaultMethod = 'GET';
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    /**
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * The list of valid HTTP methods associated with requests that could be routed.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     *
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * @type {Array<string>}

dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const validMethods = ['DELETE', 'GET', 'HEAD', 'PATCH', 'POST', 'PUT'];
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    /*
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      Copyright 2018 Google LLC
