dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    /**
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * @param {function()|Object} handler Either a function, or an object with a
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * 'handle' method.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * @return {Object} An object with a handle method.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     *
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * @private
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const normalizeHandler = handler => {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      if (handler && typeof handler === 'object') {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          finalAssertExports.hasMethod(handler, 'handle', {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            moduleName: 'workbox-routing',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            className: 'Route',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            funcName: 'constructor',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            paramName: 'handler'
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          });
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        return handler;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      } else {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          finalAssertExports.isType(handler, 'function', {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            moduleName: 'workbox-routing',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            className: 'Route',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            funcName: 'constructor',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            paramName: 'handler'
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          });
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        return {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          handle: handler
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        };
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    };
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    /*
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      Copyright 2018 Google LLC
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      Use of this source code is governed by an MIT-style
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      license that can be found in the LICENSE file or at
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    /**
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * A `Route` consists of a pair of callback functions, "match" and "handler".
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * The "match" callback determine if a route should be used to "handle" a
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * request by returning a non-falsy value if it can. The "handler" callback
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * is called when there is a match and should return a Promise that resolves
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * to a `Response`.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     *
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * @memberof workbox-routing
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    class Route {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      /**
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * Constructor for Route class.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       *
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * @param {workbox-routing~matchCallback} match
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * A callback function that determines whether the route matches a given
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * `fetch` event by returning a non-falsy value.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * @param {workbox-routing~handlerCallback} handler A callback
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * function that returns a Promise resolving to a Response.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * @param {string} [method='GET'] The HTTP method to match the Route
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * against.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      constructor(match, handler, method = defaultMethod) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          finalAssertExports.isType(match, 'function', {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            moduleName: 'workbox-routing',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            className: 'Route',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            funcName: 'constructor',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            paramName: 'match'
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          });
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          if (method) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            finalAssertExports.isOneOf(method, validMethods, {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:              paramName: 'method'
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            });
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        // These values are referenced directly by Router so cannot be
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        // altered by minificaton.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        this.handler = normalizeHandler(handler);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        this.match = match;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        this.method = method;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      /**
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       *
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * @param {workbox-routing-handlerCallback} handler A callback
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * function that returns a Promise resolving to a Response
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      setCatchHandler(handler) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        this.catchHandler = normalizeHandler(handler);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    /*
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      Copyright 2018 Google LLC
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      Use of this source code is governed by an MIT-style
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      license that can be found in the LICENSE file or at
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    /**
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * RegExpRoute makes it easy to create a regular expression based
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * {@link workbox-routing.Route}.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     *
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * For same-origin requests the RegExp only needs to match part of the URL. For
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * requests against third-party servers, you must define a RegExp that matches
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * the start of the URL.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     *
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * @memberof workbox-routing
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     * @extends workbox-routing.Route
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:     */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    class RegExpRoute extends Route {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      /**
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * If the regular expression contains
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * [capture groups]{@link https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/RegExp#grouping-back-references},
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * the captured values will be passed to the
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * {@link workbox-routing~handlerCallback} `params`
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * argument.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       *
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * @param {RegExp} regExp The regular expression to match against URLs.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * @param {workbox-routing~handlerCallback} handler A callback
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * function that returns a Promise resulting in a Response.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * @param {string} [method='GET'] The HTTP method to match the Route
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       * against.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:       */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      constructor(regExp, handler, method) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          finalAssertExports.isInstance(regExp, RegExp, {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            moduleName: 'workbox-routing',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            className: 'RegExpRoute',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            funcName: 'constructor',
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            paramName: 'pattern'
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          });
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        const match = ({
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          url
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        }) => {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          const result = regExp.exec(url.href);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          // Return immediately if there's no match.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          if (!result) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            return;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          // Require that the match start at the first character in the URL string
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          // if it's a cross-origin request.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          // See https://github.com/GoogleChrome/workbox/issues/281 for the context
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          // behind this behavior.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          if (url.origin !== location.origin && result.index !== 0) {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:              logger.debug(`The regular expression '${regExp.toString()}' only partially matched ` + `against the cross-origin URL '${url.toString()}'. RegExpRoute's will only ` + `handle cross-origin requests if they match the entire URL.`);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:            return;
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          // If the route matches, but there aren't any capture groups defined, then
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          // this will return [], which is truthy and therefore sufficient to
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          // indicate a match.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          // If there are capture groups, then it will return their values.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:          return result.slice(1);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        };
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:        super(match, handler, method);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    }
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    /*
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      Copyright 2018 Google LLC
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      Use of this source code is governed by an MIT-style
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      license that can be found in the LICENSE file or at
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    */
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    const getFriendlyURL = url => {
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      const urlObj = new URL(String(url), location.href);
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      // See https://github.com/GoogleChrome/workbox/issues/2323
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      // We want to include everything, except for the origin if it's same-origin.
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      return urlObj.href.replace(new RegExp(`^${location.origin}`), '');
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    };
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:    /*
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      Copyright 2018 Google LLC
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      Use of this source code is governed by an MIT-style
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      license that can be found in the LICENSE file or at
dev-dist/workbox-7e5eb42b.js:      https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT.
dev-dist/workbox-7e
